| ТХЊтЕџЬЋй | жЇљт┤ЄуЊЦ |
| --- | --- |
| Уц░Тњ│тбаТха№йЄуѕюжЇЕУЎ╣тџј | Уц░Тњ│тба `PartCategory` уЂЈТ░ГТБц `selectionPolicy`жћЏт«Ї@PartAnno` уЂЈТ░ГТБц `required` уђЏТЦЂЬєїжћЏт«ЇModuleConstraintExecutor` уЂЈТ░ГТБц `validate(ModuleValidateReq)` |
| жЇњтЌЎУбФУ╣ЄтЉ┤РѓгтцІРѓг?| жљЕЬєйуѕБуњЂТЇљЬЁИжЈёЬѕџТ╣ф `PartCategory` ТЙДуѓ▓тДъжќФтцІтФеу╗ЏТаФТџљжћЏт▓ёЬЏ╗жЈѕуєИТЋ«жјИ?`REQUIRED` ТХЊ?`OPTIONAL` |
| уЉЎтІФтъ»жљбуєИТЎЦжЈЅРђ▓Тгб | жЇџЬѓбтй▓жќФтцітъју╗ФУЇцТ«Љу╝ЂтІФТѓјуЉЎтІФтъ»У╣ЄтЉ┤сђЈжЈѕ?guardжћЏТХўтй▓жќФтцітъју╗Фу╗ўТ╣ГуљџЬѓЦЬЏдтД╣тѓЎугќжЈѕЬЂЄЬЮджќФтцІтФежЈЃУ«╣у┤ЮуњЄсЃеЬЮЅжЇњТгјугЅжљбуєИТЎЦ |
| жљДУЌЅТѓЋжЇЌТЏАЬЄбТХћ?| жЇЎЬЂёТ╣фуЉЎтІФтъ»у╝ЂТЮЉт«│жЇЈсёЕтё┤ present жЈЃТЃ░ЬЏдтД╣тѓџТЄАТХЊЬЁътјЉуњЂ?tupleжћЏТХўтй▓жќФтцїТи«Тљ┤?absent жЈЃТюхугЅт»«тЊётЪЌжќ░тХЄуќє |
| ТдЏТѕЮТѓЋжЇЌТЏАЬЄбТХћ?| у╗ѓСй╣ЬёЏт«ИТЪЦРѓгтцІтФе tupleжћЏТХўтй▓жќФтцїТи«Тљ┤?absent жЈЃУи║сЂЅжљњТюхугЅжЇЏТѕњУЁЉжћЏт▒╝угЅт»░ТЦђТ┤юТХЊТ┤фу▓джЇџтХЁт┤ЪуЉЎтІФтъ»т»«тЊётЪЌжЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцітъју╗ФУ»▓тџГжљю?|
| ТББТаеТ╣Ажј║сёет┤ўжЈѓУДёЬћЇ | жќ▓тЏЕТЋцжѕЦТ╗ђУб▒жЌЃУѕхЬєїТХЊу╗ўую░уЉЎ?+ жЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцЅТгбуЉЂтѓџтйЅ/уљЏсЃЦтЈЈжѕЦТ┐ѕТ«ЉжјхЛєЬћЉжЈѓУДёЬћЇ |
| ТЙХтЏгРѓгтцІТЪЪтдЌ?| ТиЄТ┐ѕТџђтД╣тѓЮлњжЇБсёЦтћ┤ presence guard жЈѓУДёЬћЇжієСййЬЄгтД╣тѓъРћЇжЇћсёеЬЮЅжЇњТгЈтДъТЮъУіЦТЪЪтдЌтаюуХћТХЊтЊёТѓЌу╝ЂЬЁЪу┤еТЮЕ?|
| ТхажћІуЅИу╗ЏТаФТџљ | `MIN` ТХЊТќЙуј»жЈЇтЦИТйфуњљуєИТцѓТдЏТе┐ЬЁ╗ТХЊтХЅтјцу╝ЃЬє╝тй▓жќФтцЅТгбжћЏТ▓ЌMAX` жЈЃУи║ти▒жЇњтаЋтјцу╝ЃЬє╝тй▓жќФтцЅТгбжћЏТХЎТБцТхажћІуЅИжљЕЬєйуѕБжЈЃТЃ░у╣ЉжЇЦ?absent/present ТХЊсѓЄУбФуЉЎ?|
| ТИџТ┐іудєжЇЈт┤ЄжЃ┤ | P0 жЇЎЬѕџЬў▓жљб?`RFC-0007` жље?`dimensionCategoryCodes` жј┤ТаДуХІжЇЊ?`RefProgObjSchema`жћЏТ▓ЌRuleReferenceSet` жЈё?`RFC-0008` жљетІГТ┤░жЈЇтЏе─ЂжЇетгХу┤ЮжЇџт║Бућ╗жЇљтХєтИ┤жЇЈ?|

---

## 1. жјйТе┐ЬЏд

Уц░Тњ│тбажЇЈуЁјЬєљ/у╝ЂтІФТѓју╗ФУЇцТФДжЇџтХЁт┤ЪуЉЎтІФтъ»Тх╝Т░ГтдИжЇЎтѓЎугїуЉЎтІФтъ»жљетІФтъју╗ФУ»▓уХІжј┤Тёгу╣ђТццУ»▓т╝гТХЊт║бую░уЉЎ№йЄТ«Љу╝ЂТЮЉт«│жћЏт▒йЬЄ▒жЉиу▓╣РѓгТ╗Ѓтй▓жќФтцљу┤ХжЈЇтЏеТ╣ГжќФтцІтФежѕЦТ┐Ёу»ЃТх╝Т░│лЋжЇЎ?CPU ТХЊт║еу┤ХжЈЇтЏЕТФДжЇџтХЁт┤ЪжЈЇ№┐ауЇЎжћЏт▒╝у▓ажЉ░т▒╝жфЄжљбуєХугЅу╗Ќ№╣ђТѓјТХЊТ░гтДЪТБ░тІгТ╣АжљетІгТБцуЉЎ№йЃРѓг?
жЈѕ?RFC жј╗Тё»ЬєЁТХЊ?`PartCategory` ТЙДуѓ▓тДъУ╣ЄтЉ┤Рѓг?жЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцІуѕБуњЂтИ«у┤ЮжфъТюхУ┤ЪжЇџЬѓбтй▓жќФтцітъју╗ФУЇцТ«ЉжљДУЌЅТѓЋжЇЌТЏАЬЮЅжЇњТгЈу┤ЕжЇЈ?guard уњЄЬЁЮу«ЪжієтѓъЬЏ╗жЈѕуєИтИ╣жЉйТё░тЎ░жљбсёцУб▒жЌЃУѕхЬєїжЈѓУДёЬћЇжћЏТ░Фт»їтД╣тѓЮлњжЇЎЬЂёЬўЕжљътЌЌу╣ђжќФтцјЬєЋТЙХтЏДТІ░жљбсёдтЪЏжЈёт║БРђўуЉЋСй╣ую░жљетІФтй▓жќФтцјЬєЋТЙХтЏиу┤▒жљбсёдтЪЏжЈѕЬЂЄЬЏдтД╣тѓюТ«ЉжЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцјЬєЋТЙХтЏДТ╣фТХЊТўЈлњТХћтгфТѓЌжјИтцјЬЮЅжЇњТгњу╣ўуљЏт▒йтй▓жќФтцј╦ЅжЇЈсёЦТІ░у╝ЂТњ┤уЂЅуЉЂтѓџтйЅжіє?
жЈѕЬёЂТъЃт«ИтЈЅт»ю `RFC-0005-0.1` жЇџт║БТ«ЉТха№йЄуѕюжЇЕУЎ╣тџјжЇњжћІТЪіжћЏТ░гуХІжЇЊтХёжфЄжЇЮСй║уЋ╗теЅТЏътЈєжЇЎ№йєТДИ `ModuleAlgBase`жћЏтГІP жЉ│УЌЅтДЈжќФТ░│у╣Ѓ `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade жЈєТњ«Т╣ХжћЏТ▓ЌConstraintAlgBase`жієС╣БConstraintModel`жієС╣БConstraintVarRegistry` жЇют▓ђТ┤┐жј║?OR-Tools у╗ФУ»▓уђиТХЊтХЁтЋђТхБТ╗ђУ┤ЪжЇЌТЦђТѓюу╗ђУй░уиЦТхБУиеТЋцжієтѓЏТ╣░ RFC ТХЊЬЁаТ«Љ `PartCategorySelectionPolicy`жієС╣Б@PartAnno(required=false)`жієС╣Бvalidate(ModuleValidateReq)` жќ«УіЦТДИжљЕЬєйуѕБжЈђтйњРѓгуі╗сђЇжћЏт▒╝угЅжЈёЬѕџуХІжЇЊтХЁтЄАуђЏТе║Т╣фжј║сЃЦтйЏжіє?
---

## 2. жЇћсёдТ║ђ

### 2.1 жЌѓЬЄђЬЋйжЉ│т▒ЙТФЎ

`RFC-0007` уђ╣Т░Фу«ЪТхютЌЎу▓ежЈІтІФт»▓у╝ЂтІФТѓјуЉЎтІФтъ»жћЏ?
- жљДУЌЅТѓЋжЇЌТЏфу┤░жќФтцЅУЁЉжљетІ»тё┤ТхатЅЂу▓ЇжЇџтаЮу╣ђТццУ»▓ТЄАТХЊЬЁАтџдуЂЈТѕюуФ┤жЈЅРђ│тјЉуњЂтЊЦу▓ЇжЇџтаЏРѓг?- ТдЏТѕЮТѓЋжЇЌТЏфу┤░у╗ѓСй╣ЬёЏжЇЏТѕњУЁЉТхаУ«│уФ┤у╗ѓСй╣ЬёЏу╝ЂтІФТѓјжіє?
ТЮЕТгЈЬџюуњЄЬЁЮу«ЪуђхуЉ░у╣ђжќФтцітъју╗Фу╗ўТДИжЇџтабТѓіжљетІЕРѓгтѓЎуиЦТ┐А?CPU ТХЊт║БРђќжљЕТЕђтЁўжЈёЬѕџу╣ђжќФтцітъју╗Фу╗ўТцѓжћЏтГІPU ТХЊт║БРђќжљЕТе╝ТФДжЇџтХЁт┤ЪжЇЎЬѕЎС║њжљЕтГўтИ┤у╗Й№ИйТйФТХЊу╗ўую░уЉЎ№йЄРћќжЌѓТигРѓг?
ТхБтЌЌЬЄ«жЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцітъју╗ФУ«│у┤░жЇЉУЎ╣т╣ЄуњЄЬЁЮу«ЪжЇљУїгуЇіжієтѓЎуиЦТ┐Атѓъу┤ХжЈЇтЏеТДИжЇЎЬѕъРѓгтцЅТгбжћЏ?
```text
CPU 8 жЈЇжЋљС║њТХЊ?-> ТдДуі│уѕБ 1
CPU 8 жЈЇжЋљС║њТХЊ?-> ТдДуі│уѕБ 2
```

Т┐АтѓЏуЂЅжљбсёдтЪЏжЇЎЬЂЄЬЏдтД╣тѓътјцу╝Ѓ?CPUжћЏт▒ЙуЌЁжЈѕтцјЬЏдтД╣тѓътјцу╝ЃЬЄђу┤ХжЈЇтЏиу┤Юу╗»УЇцу▓║ТХЊтХЁу░▓уњЄсЃЦТ┤юТХЊуЃўтБўТХЊтХЁтЪїТдДуі│уѕБу╝ЂтІФТѓјжЉ░т▒ЙтДцжќ┐ТгЇРѓгтѓџтйДжЈѕтціуХІжљбсёдтЪЏжЈёт║БРђўуЉЋСй╣ую░ТдДуі│уѕБжћЏт▒Йтъеу╗ЏТа
... (truncated)

## У«ЙУ«Атє│уГќТЉўУдЂ

Тюг RFC тЇЋуІгУ«еУ«║РђютЈ»жђЅ PartCategory тЈѓСИјуЎйтљЇтЇЋ/ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎТЌХ№╝їУДётѕЎСйЋТЌХућЪТЋѕРђЮуџё guard У»ГС╣ЅсђѓТаИт┐ЃуЏ«ТаЄТў»№╝џт«џС╣ЅС║є CPU СИјж╝аТаЄуџёжЁЇтЦЌтЁ│у│╗№╝їСИЇт║ћт»╝УЄ┤ућеТѕитЈфжЁЇуй« CPU ТЌХТЌаУДБ№╝ЏСйєСИђТЌдућеТѕиТўјуА«жђЅТІЕж╝аТаЄ№╝їCPU СИјж╝аТаЄуџёжЁЇтЦЌУДётѕЎт┐ЁжА╗ућЪТЋѕсђѓ

| СИ╗жбў | тє│уГќ |
| --- | --- |
| тйЊтЅЇС╗БуаЂтЪ║у║┐ | тйЊтЅЇ `PartCategory` т░џТЌа `selectionPolicy`№╝ї`@PartAnno` т░џТЌа `required` тГЌТ«х№╝ї`ModuleConstraintExecutor` т░џТЌа `validate(ModuleValidateReq)` |
| тѕєу▒╗т┐ЁжђЅТђД | уЏ«ТаЄУ«ЙУ«АТў»тюе `PartCategory` тбътіажђЅТІЕуГќуЋЦ№╝їждќТюЪТћ»ТїЂ `REQUIRED` СИј `OPTIONAL` |
| УДётѕЎућЪТЋѕТЮАС╗Х | тљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎт┐ЁжА╗ТюЅ guard№╝ЏтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТюфУбФУдЂТ▒ѓСИћТюфУбФжђЅТІЕТЌХ№╝їУ»ЦУДётѕЎСИЇућЪТЋѕ |
| уЎйтљЇтЇЋУ»ГС╣Ѕ | тЈфтюеУДётѕЎу╗┤т║дтЁежЃе present ТЌХУдЂТ▒ѓтЉйСИГтЁЂУ«И tuple№╝ЏтЈ»жђЅу╗┤т║д absent ТЌХСИЇт╝║тѕХжЁЇуй« |
| ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋУ»ГС╣Ѕ | удЂТГбти▓жђЅТІЕ tuple№╝ЏтЈ»жђЅу╗┤т║д absent ТЌХтцЕуёХСИЇтЉйСИГ№╝їСИЇтЙЌтЏаСИ║ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎт╝║тѕХтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЄ║уј░ |
| ждќТюЪТјеУЇљТќ╣ТАѕ | жЄЄућеРђюСИцжўХТ«хСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБ + тЈ»жђЅС╗ХУБѓтЈў/УАЦтЁеРђЮуџёТЅДУАїТќ╣ТАѕ |
| тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ | С┐ЮуЋЎТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guard Тќ╣ТАѕсђЂУ»иТ▒ѓжЕ▒тіеУДётѕЎтіаУййТќ╣ТАѕСйюСИ║тљју╗ГТ╝ћУ┐Џ |
| С╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦ | `MIN` СИћС╗иТа╝жЮъУ┤ЪТЌХж╗ўУ«цСИЇжЁЇуй«тЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝Џ`MAX` ТЌХт╝║тѕХжЁЇуй«тЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝ЏТЌаС╗иТа╝уЏ«ТаЄТЌХУ┐ћтЏъ absent/present СИцу▒╗УДБ |
| СЙЮУхќтЁ│у│╗ | P0 тЈ»тцЇуће `RFC-0007` уџё `dimensionCategoryCodes` ТѕќтйЊтЅЇ `RefProgObjSchema`№╝Џ`RuleReferenceSet` Тў» `RFC-0008` уџёуЏ«ТаЄТеАтъІ№╝їтљју╗ГтєЇТјЦтЁЦ |

---

## 1. ТЉўУдЂ

тйЊтЅЇтЁ╝т«╣/у╗ётљѕу▒╗уЎйтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎС╝џТіітЈѓСИјУДётѕЎуџётѕєу▒╗тйЊТѕљт┐ЁжА╗тЈѓСИјТ▒ѓУДБуџёу╗┤т║д№╝їт»╝УЄ┤РђютЈ»жђЅж╝аТаЄТюфжђЅТІЕРђЮС╣ЪС╝џУДдтЈЉ CPU СИјж╝аТаЄуЎйтљЇтЇЋТаАжфї№╝їС╗јУђїС║ДућЪСИЇугдтљѕСИџтіАжбёТюЪуџёТЌаУДБсђѓ

Тюг RFC ТЈљУ««СИ║ `PartCategory` тбътіат┐ЁжђЅ/тЈ»жђЅТаЄУ«░№╝їт╣ХСИ║тљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёуЎйтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎт╝ЋтЁЦ guard У»ГС╣ЅсђѓждќТюЪТјеУЇљжЄЄућеСИцжўХТ«хТќ╣ТАѕ№╝џСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБтЈфтцёуљєт┐ЁжђЅУ«ЙтцЄтњїућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓуџётЈ»жђЅУ«ЙтцЄ№╝ЏућеТѕиТюфУдЂТ▒ѓуџётЈ»жђЅУ«ЙтцЄтюеСИ╗УДБС╣ІтљјТїЅУДётѕЎУ┐ЏУАїтЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁетњїу╗ЊТъюУБѓтЈўсђѓ

ТюгТќЄти▓ТїЅ `RFC-0005-0.1` тљјуџёС╗БуаЂтЪ║у║┐тѕиТќ░№╝џтйЊтЅЇС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋтЁЦтЈБТў» `ModuleAlgBase`№╝їCP УЃйтіЏжђџУ┐Є `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade Тџ┤жю▓№╝Џ`ConstraintAlgBase`сђЂ`ConstraintModel`сђЂ`ConstraintVarRegistry` тњїуЏ┤ТјЦ OR-Tools у▒╗тъІСИЇтєЇСйюСИ║тЇЌтљЉуц║СЙІСй┐ућесђѓТюг RFC СИГуџё `PartCategorySelectionPolicy`сђЂ`@PartAnno(required=false)`сђЂ`validate(ModuleValidateReq)` жЃйТў»уЏ«ТаЄТћ╣жђажА╣№╝їСИЇТў»тйЊтЅЇти▓тГўтюеТјЦтЈБсђѓ

---

## 2. тіеТю║

### 2.1 жЌ«жбўУЃїТЎ»

`RFC-0007` т«џС╣ЅС║єу╗ЊТъётїќу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎ№╝џ

- уЎйтљЇтЇЋ№╝џжђЅСИГуџёжЃеС╗Ху╗ётљѕт┐ЁжА╗тЉйСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђТЮАтЁЂУ«Иу╗ётљѕсђѓ
- ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋ№╝џудЂТГбтЉйСИГС╗╗СИђудЂТГбу╗ётљѕсђѓ

У┐ЎтЦЌУ»ГС╣Ѕт»╣т┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗Тў»тљѕуљєуџёсђѓСЙІтдѓ CPU СИјуАгуЏўжЃйТў»т┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХ№╝їCPU СИјуАгуЏўуЎйтљЇтЇЋтЈ»С╗ЦуЏ┤ТјЦу║дТЮЪСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБуЕ║жЌ┤сђѓ

Сйєт»╣тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╝џтЄ║уј░У»ГС╣Ѕтє▓уфЂсђѓСЙІтдѓж╝аТаЄТў»тЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝џ

```text
CPU 8 ТаИС╗ЦСИІ -> ж╝аТаЄ 1
CPU 8 ТаИС╗ЦСИі -> ж╝аТаЄ 2
```

тдѓТъюућеТѕитЈфУдЂТ▒ѓжЁЇуй« CPU№╝їТ▓АТюЅУдЂТ▒ѓжЁЇуй«ж╝аТаЄ№╝їу│╗у╗ЪСИЇт║ћУ»ЦтЏаСИ║ТЅЙСИЇтѕ░ж╝аТаЄу╗ётљѕУђїТіЦжћЎсђѓтЈфТюЅтйЊућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓж╝аТаЄ№╝їТѕќуГќуЋЦтє│т«џућЪТѕљРђютИдж╝аТаЄРђЮуџёТЅЕт▒ЋТќ╣ТАѕТЌХ№╝їCPU СИјж╝аТаЄжЁЇтЦЌУДётѕЎТЅЇт║ћУ»ЦтЈѓСИјТаАжфїсђѓ

### 2.2 тйЊтЅЇС╗БуаЂСИГуџёТа╣тЏа

тйЊтЅЇ `CompatibleConstraintAlg.addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible` С╝џт»╣тидтЈ│СИцСЙДжЃеС╗ХжЏєтљѕТЅДУАї `addExactlyOneConstraint`сђѓУ┐ЎТёЈтЉ│уЮђтЈфУдЂтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎУбФтіаУйй№╝їтидтЈ│тѕєу▒╗жЃйС╝џУбФт╝║тѕХжђЅТІЕСИђСИфжЃеС╗Хсђѓ

т»╣С║јт┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝їУ┐ЎСИфтЅ»СйюућежђџтИИСИјСИџтіАуЏ«ТаЄСИђУЄ┤№╝Џт»╣С║јтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝їт«ЃС╝џТііРђютЈўжЄЈтГўтюеРђЮУ»»УДБТѕљРђют┐ЁжА╗жЁЇуй«РђЮ№╝їС╗јУђїУ«ЕтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈўТѕљжџљт╝Јт┐ЁжђЅсђѓ

#### 5.1.3 у╗ЊТъюТјњт║Ј

у╗ЊТъюУ┐ћтЏъТЌХТїЅуГќуЋЦтљѕт╣ХТјњт║Ј№╝џ

| У»иТ▒ѓуГќуЋЦ | тЈ»жђЅС╗Хтцёуљє |
| --- | --- |
| С╗иТа╝Тюђт░Ј `MIN` | тдѓТъютЈ»жђЅС╗ХС╗иТа╝жЮъУ┤Ъ№╝їж╗ўУ«цтЈфУ┐ћтЏъ absent тѕєТћ» |
| С╗иТа╝ТюђтцД `MAX` | т╝║тѕХ present тѕєТћ»№╝ЏтдѓТъюУАЦтЁетц▒У┤ЦтѕЎУ»ЦСИ╗УДБСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ |
| ТЌаС╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦ | У┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тѕєТћ»№╝їС║цу╗ЎућеТѕитѕцТќГ |
| ТїЄт«џ `mouse` жюђТ▒ѓ | СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБТѕќУАЦтЁежўХТ«хт┐ЁжА╗ present№╝їСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ absent тѕєТћ» |

Т│еТёЈ№╝џтдѓТъютљју╗ГТћ»ТїЂУ┤ЪС╗иТа╝сђЂТіўТЅБсђЂУхатЊЂТѕќтЦЌжцљУ┐ћуѓ╣№╝ї`MIN` СИЇт║ћу«ђтЇЋУи│У┐ЄтЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝їУђїУдЂућ▒С╗иТа╝уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░тѕцТќГсђѓ

### 5.2 тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A№╝џТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guard

т░єтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╣Ъу║│тЁЦтљїСИђСИф CP-SAT ТеАтъІ№╝їСИ║Т»ЈСИфтѕєу▒╗тѕЏт╗║ `present` тИЃт░ћтЈўжЄЈ№╝їт╣ХСй┐уће `OnlyEnforceIf` ТјДтѕХу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎсђѓ

тєЁжЃет«ъуј░С╝фС╗БуаЂ№╝џ

```java
BoolVar mousePresent = model.newBoolVar("mouse_present");
LinearExpr mouseSelected = sumSelected("mouse");

model.addGreaterOrEqual(mouseSelected, 1).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
model.addEquality(mouseSelected, 0).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent.not());

Constraint white = model.addAllowedAssignments(
        new LinearArgument[] { cpuChoice, mouseChoice });
white.addTuple(cpu1Id, mouse1Id);
white.addTuple(cpu2Id, mouse2Id);
white.onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
```

УІЦУ┐Ўу▒╗УЃйтіЏжюђУдЂУ┐ЏтЁЦС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋТѕќућЪТѕљт╝ЈтЇЌтљЉу«ЌТ│Ћ№╝їт║ћТћ╣тєЎСИ║ facade тЈБтЙё№╝їСЙІтдѓ№╝џ

```java
AlgCPBoolVar mousePresent = model().newBoolVar("mouse_present");
PartAlgCPLinearExpr mouseSelected = model().sum4Selected("mouse", "Quantity", "");

model().addGreaterOrEqual(mouseSelected, 1).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
model().addEquality(mouseSelected, 0).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent.not());
```

тйЊтЅЇ `ModuleCPModel` ти▓Тћ»ТїЂ `newBoolVar`сђЂу║┐ТђДУАеУЙЙсђЂ`onlyEnforceIf` уГЅтЪ║уАђУЃйтіЏ№╝їСйєт░џТюфТџ┤жю▓ `addAllowedAssignments` / `addForbiddenAssignments`сђѓтЏаТГц table constraint уЅѕТюгтЈфУЃйСйюСИ║тєЁжЃет«ъуј░уаћуЕХТѕќтљју╗Г facade ТЅЕт▒Ћ№╝їСИЇУЃйтєЎУ┐ЏтйЊтЅЇС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋжфїТћХС╗БуаЂсђѓ

С╝ўуѓ╣№╝џ

- У»ГС╣ЅТюђу╗ЪСИђсђѓ
- тЈ»С╗ЦУјитЙЌтЁет▒ђТюђС╝ўУДБсђѓ
- жђѓтљѕТюфТЮЦтцџСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С║њуЏИтй▒тЊЇуџётцЇТЮѓтю║ТЎ»сђѓ

у╝║уѓ╣№╝џ

- жюђУдЂтЁѕУАЦжйљтѕєу▒╗ cardinalityсђЂchoice varсђЂtuple table уГЅт║Ћт▒ѓт╗║ТеАУЃйтіЏсђѓ
- тйЊтЅЇ `CompatibleConstraintAlg` СИГ `ExactlyOne` тЅ»СйюућежюђУдЂжЄЇТъёсђѓ
- тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тцџТЌХ№╝їСИ╗ТеАтъІтЈўжЄЈтњї tuple ТЋ░жЄЈС╝џТўјТўЙУєеУЃђсђѓ

### 5.3 тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ B№╝џУ»иТ▒ѓжЕ▒тіеУДётѕЎтіаУйй

УДётѕЎтіаУййТЌХтЁѕТа╣ТЇ«У»иТ▒ѓтѕцТќГТў»тљдтіаУййтљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёУДётѕЎ№╝џ

```text
if request contains mouse:
    load cpu_mouse_white
else:
    skip cpu_mouse_white
```

С╝ўуѓ╣№╝џ

- Тћ╣тіеТюђт░Јсђѓ
- тЙѕжђѓтљѕРђюућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂж╝аТаЄТЅЇТаАжфїж╝аТаЄРђЮуџёуггСИђт▒ѓжюђТ▒ѓсђѓ

у╝║уѓ╣№╝џ

- ТЌаТ│ЋУЄфуёХућЪТѕљРђютИдж╝аТаЄ/СИЇтИдж╝аТаЄРђЮСИцу▒╗у╗ЊТъюсђѓ
- тдѓТъюС╗иТа╝ `MAX` ТѕќТјеУЇљуГќуЋЦтИїТюЏСИ╗тіежЁЇуй«тЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝їтЇЋу║»ТїЅУ»иТ▒ѓтіаУййС╝џТ╝ЈТјЅУДётѕЎсђѓ
- УДётѕЎСЙЮУхќтЁ│у│╗жюђУдЂтЄєуА«№╝їтљдтѕЎти«жЄЈтіаУййт«╣ТўЊСИЇт«їТЋ┤сђѓ

### 5.4 тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ C№╝џтљјуй«УДётѕЎт╝ЋТЊјТаАжфї/У┐ЄТ╗ц

СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБСИЇУђЃУЎЉтЈ»жђЅУДётѕЎ№╝їтЙЌтѕ░у╗ЊТъютљјућеУДётѕЎт╝ЋТЊјТБђТЪЦтњїУ┐ЄТ╗цтЈ»жђЅТЅЕт▒Ћсђѓ

С╝ўуѓ╣№╝џ

- СИ╗ТеАтъІТюђу«ђтЇЋсђѓ
- тЈ»т┐ФжђЪжфїУ»ЂСИџтіАТхЂуеІсђѓ

у╝║уѓ╣№╝џ

- СИЇУЃйС┐ЮУ»ЂтЈ»жђЅТЅЕт▒ЋуџётЁет▒ђтЈ»УАїТђДтњїТюђС╝ўТђДсђѓ
- тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╣ІжЌ┤тГўтюеУЂћтіеТЌХ№╝їтљјуй«У┐ЄТ╗цтЈ»УЃйС║ДућЪтцДжЄЈТЌаТЋѕтђЎжђЅсђѓ
- СИј `validate(ModuleValidateReq)` уџёу╗ЪСИђУ»ГС╣Ѕт«╣ТўЊтѕєУБѓсђѓ

Тюг RFC СИЇТјеУЇљТіі C СйюСИ║жЋ┐ТюЪТќ╣ТАѕ№╝їтЈфжђѓтљѕСИ┤ТЌХжфїУ»Ђсђѓ

### 6.4 тЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁетЎе

Тќ░тбъУАЦтЁеу╗ёС╗Х№╝џ

```java
public final class OptionalPartAugmenter {
    List<ModuleInst> augment(
            Module module,
            List<ModuleInst> baseSolutions,
            List<Rule> optionalRules,
            OptionalAugmentPolicy policy) {
        // 1. absent branch: тцЇтѕХСИ╗УДБ№╝їТаЄУ«░тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТюфжЁЇуй«
        // 2. present branch: тЏ║т«џСИ╗УДБ№╝їт╝║тѕХ optional category present
        // 3. тіаУйй optionalRules№╝їУ┐љУАїУй╗жЄЈТ▒ѓУДБ
        // 4. тљѕт╣ХтњїТјњт║Ј
    }
}
```

ждќТюЪу║дТЮЪ№╝џ

- Т»ЈСИфСИ╗УДБт»╣Т»ЈСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈфТ▒ѓСИђСИфтЈ»УАїУАЦтЁесђѓ
- СИЇТъџСИЙтљїСИђтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗СИІуџёТЅђТюЅу╗ётљѕсђѓ
- тцџСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тљїТЌХтГўтюеТЌХ№╝їж╗ўУ«цТїЅжЁЇуй«жЎљтѕХТюђтцДУБѓтЈўТЋ░жЄЈ№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇ `2^N` уѕєуѓИсђѓ

### 6.5 CompatibleConstraintAlg тј╗ТјЅжџљт╝Ј ExactlyOne

тйЊтЅЇтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎСИЇт║ћТЅ┐ТІЁРђютѕєу▒╗т┐ЁжА╗жђЅСИђСИфРђЮуџёУЂїУ┤Бсђѓт╗║У««т░є№╝џ

```java
addExactlyOneConstraint(leftPartsExpr.getPartVars());
addExactlyOneConstraint(rightPartsExpr.getPartVars());
```

У┐ЂуД╗тѕ░ТўјуА«уџёжђЅТІЕУДётѕЎТѕќтѕєу▒╗ cardinality УДётѕЎСИГсђѓ

тЁ╝т«╣/у╗ётљѕУДётѕЎтЈфУАеУЙЙу╗ётљѕтљѕТ│ЋТђД№╝џ

```text
WHITE: present tuple must be in allowed tuples
BLACK: selected forbidden tuple is not allowed
REQUIRES: if left tuple present then right guard must be present
```

У┐ЎТаиТЅЇУЃйжЂ┐тЁЇтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗УбФтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎт╝║тѕХжђЅТІЕсђѓ

## 9. жБјжЎЕСИјтЁ╝т«╣уГќуЋЦ

### 9.1 у╗ЊТъюТЋ░жЄЈУєеУЃђ

тцџСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╝џС║ДућЪу╗ётљѕУБѓтЈўсђѓу╝ЊУДБуГќуЋЦ№╝џ

- P0 тЈфт»╣ТўјуА«жЁЇуй«СИ║тЈ»ТјеУЇљуџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЂџУБѓтЈўсђѓ
- тбътіаТюђтцДУБѓтЈўТЋ░жЄЈжЁЇуй«сђѓ
- Т»ЈСИфСИ╗УДБТ»ЈСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈфТ▒ѓСИђСИфтЈ»УАїУАЦтЁесђѓ
- тљју╗ГТћ»ТїЂТїЅС╗итђ╝/С╗иТа╝Тјњт║ЈТѕфТќГсђѓ

### 9.2 СИ╗УДБСИјтЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁеСИЇТў»тЁет▒ђТюђС╝ў

СИцжўХТ«хТ▒ѓУДБтЈ»УЃйТЌаТ│ЋС┐ЮУ»ЂРђют┐ЁжђЅ + тЈ»жђЅРђЮТЋ┤СйЊтЁет▒ђТюђС╝ўсђѓждќТюЪТјЦтЈЌУ»ЦжЎљтѕХ№╝їтЏаСИ║СИџтіАуЏ«ТаЄТў»жЂ┐тЁЇтЈ»жђЅС╗Хтй▒тЊЇСИ╗У«ЙтцЄТ▒ѓУДБ№╝їт╣ХСИћУЙЁТќЎжђџтИИСйјС╗итђ╝сђѓ

тдѓТъютљју╗ГжюђУдЂСИЦТа╝тЁет▒ђТюђС╝ў№╝їт║ћУйгтљЉРђютцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A№╝џТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guardРђЮсђѓ

### 9.3 УДётѕЎСЙЮУхќУ»єтѕФСИЇт«їТЋ┤

тдѓТъюУДётѕЎт╝ЋућетЁ│у│╗СИЇтЄєуА«№╝їтЈ»УЃйТ╝ЈтіаУййтЈ»жђЅУДётѕЎсђѓP0 тюеТхІУ»ЋТЋ░ТЇ«тњї `CombinationStructRuleSchema.dimensionCategoryCodes` СИГТўјуА«тєЎТГ╗у╗┤т║д№╝їС╣ЪтЈ»С╗ЦтцЇућетйЊтЅЇ `RefProgObjSchema` т╝ЋућетѕЌУАе№╝Џтљју╗ГСй┐уће `RFC-0008` уџё `RuleReferenceSet` у╗ЪСИђСЙЮУхќсђѓ

### 9.4 ТЌДУДётѕЎтЁ╝т«╣

тйЊтЅЇТЅђТюЅтѕєу▒╗жЃйТ▓АТюЅ `required=false` тЁЦтЈБ№╝їУ┐ЂуД╗тљјС╣Ът┐ЁжА╗ж╗ўУ«цУДєСИ║т┐ЁжђЅ№╝їуА«С┐Юти▓ТюЅућеСЙІУАїСИ║СИЇтЈўсђѓ

### 9.5 тЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎУЂїУ┤БУЙ╣уЋїтЈўтїќ

уД╗жЎцтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎСИГуџёжџљт╝Ј `ExactlyOne` тљј№╝їтјЪТЮЦСЙЮУхќУ»ЦтЅ»СйюућеуџёТхІУ»ЋтЈ»УЃйжюђУдЂУАЦтЁЁТўЙт╝ЈжђЅТІЕУДётѕЎсђѓУ┐ЂуД╗уГќуЋЦ№╝џ

- т┐ЁжђЅтЇЋжђЅтѕєу▒╗жђџУ┐Єтѕєу▒╗ cardinality Тѕќ `SelectRule` УАеУЙЙсђѓ
- тЁ╝т«╣/у╗ётљѕУДётѕЎтЈфУАеУЙЙУиетѕєу▒╗тљѕТ│ЋТђДсђѓ

## 5. У«ЙУ«АТќ╣ТАѕ

### 5.1 ТјеУЇљТќ╣ТАѕ№╝џСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБ + тЈ»жђЅС╗ХУБѓтЈўУАЦтЁе

ждќТюЪТјеУЇљжЄЄућеСИцжўХТ«хТЅДУАїсђѓ

#### 5.1.1 жўХТ«хСИђ№╝џт┐ЁжђЅУ«ЙтцЄСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБ

СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБжўХТ«хтЈфтіаУйй№╝џ

- СИЇтљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёУДётѕЎсђѓ
- ућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓуџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уЏИтЁ│УДётѕЎсђѓ
- С╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦТѕќУ»иТ▒ѓуГќуЋЦТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓ present уџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уЏИтЁ│УДётѕЎсђѓ

тдѓТъюућеТѕиТюфУдЂТ▒ѓ `mouse`№╝їтѕЎ `cpu_mouse_white` СИЇУ┐ЏтЁЦСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБуАгу║дТЮЪсђѓ

СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБУЙЊтЄ║тЪ║уАђУДБ№╝џ

```text
S1 = cpu1 + disk1
S2 = cpu2 + disk2
...
```

#### 5.1.2 жўХТ«хС║ї№╝џтЈ»жђЅС╗ХУБѓтЈў

т»╣Т»ЈСИфтЪ║уАђУДБ№╝їТїЅтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ућЪТѕљтѕєТћ»№╝џ

```text
S1.absentMouse  = cpu1 + disk1
S1.presentMouse = cpu1 + disk1 + mouseX
```

`presentMouse` тѕєТћ»СИЇТў»ТъџСИЙТЅђТюЅж╝аТаЄу╗ётљѕ№╝їУђїТў»У┐љУАїСИђСИфУй╗жЄЈУАЦтЁеТ▒ѓУДБ№╝џ

1. тЏ║т«џСИ╗УДБСИГуџёт┐ЁжђЅжЃеС╗ХжђЅТІЕтњїТЋ░жЄЈсђѓ
2. т╝║тѕХ `mouse.present = true`сђѓ
3. тіаУйй `cpu_mouse_white` уГЅТХЅтЈі mouse уџёу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎсђѓ
4. тЈфТ▒ѓСИђСИфтЈ»УАїУАЦтЁе№╝їТѕќТїЅС╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦТ▒ѓСИђСИфТюђС╝ўУАЦтЁесђѓ

У┐ЎТаиСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБС╗ЇтЁ│Т│ежФўС╗итђ╝/т┐ЁжђЅУ«ЙтцЄ№╝їтЈ»жђЅС╗ХСйюСИ║СйјС╗итђ╝УЙЁТќЎтюетљјтцёуљєжўХТ«хУАЦтЁесђѓ

#### 5.1.3 у╗ЊТъюТјњт║Ј

у╗ЊТъюУ┐ћтЏъТЌХТїЅуГќуЋЦтљѕт╣ХТјњт║Ј№╝џ

| У»иТ▒ѓуГќуЋЦ | тЈ»жђЅС╗Хтцёуљє |
| --- | --- |
| С╗иТа╝Тюђт░Ј `MIN` | тдѓТъютЈ»жђЅС╗ХС╗иТа╝жЮъУ┤Ъ№╝їж╗ўУ«цтЈфУ┐ћтЏъ absent тѕєТћ» |
| С╗иТа╝ТюђтцД `MAX` | т╝║тѕХ present тѕєТћ»№╝ЏтдѓТъюУАЦтЁетц▒У┤ЦтѕЎУ»ЦСИ╗УДБСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ |
| ТЌаС╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦ | У┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тѕєТћ»№╝їС║цу╗ЎућеТѕитѕцТќГ |
| ТїЄт«џ `mouse` жюђТ▒ѓ | СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБТѕќУАЦтЁежўХТ«хт┐ЁжА╗ present№╝їСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ absent тѕєТћ» |

Т│еТёЈ№╝џтдѓТъютљју╗ГТћ»ТїЂУ┤ЪС╗иТа╝сђЂТіўТЅБсђЂУхатЊЂТѕќтЦЌжцљУ┐ћуѓ╣№╝ї`MIN` СИЇт║ћу«ђтЇЋУи│У┐ЄтЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝їУђїУдЂућ▒С╗иТа╝уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░тѕцТќГсђѓ

### 5.2 тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A№╝џТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guard

т░єтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╣Ъу║│тЁЦтљїСИђСИф CP-SAT ТеАтъІ№╝їСИ║Т»ЈСИфтѕєу▒╗тѕЏт╗║ `present` тИЃт░ћтЈўжЄЈ№╝їт╣ХСй┐уће `OnlyEnforceIf` ТјДтѕХу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎсђѓ

тєЁжЃет«ъуј░С╝фС╗БуаЂ№╝џ

```java
BoolVar mousePresent = model.newBoolVar("mouse_present");
LinearExpr mouseSelected = sumSelected("mouse");

model.addGreaterOrEqual(mouseSelected, 1).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
model.addEquality(mouseSelected, 0).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent.not());

Constraint white = model.addAllowedAssignments(
        new LinearArgument[] { cpuChoice, mouseChoice });
white.addTuple(cpu1Id, mouse1Id);
white.addTuple(cpu2Id, mouse2Id);
white.onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
```

УІЦУ┐Ўу▒╗УЃйтіЏжюђУдЂУ┐ЏтЁЦС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋТѕќућЪТѕљт╝ЈтЇЌтљЉу«ЌТ│Ћ№╝їт║ћТћ╣тєЎСИ║ facade тЈБтЙё№╝їСЙІтдѓ№╝џ
```
</details></tool-use>

# RFC-0007: у╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎСИју╗ётљѕУДётѕЎ Schema

> уіХТђЂ№╝џУЇЅТАѕ№╝ѕDraft№╝Ѕ
> ТЌЦТюЪ№╝џ2026-05-19
> уЏИтЁ│ТќЄТАБ№╝џ`doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`, `doc/RFC-0005-0.1-North-South-Interface-Decoupling-Patch.md`, `doc/RFC-0006-North-Interface-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0008-Rule-Model-IR-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md`

---

## У«ЙУ«Атє│уГќТЉўУдЂ

Тюг RFC У«еУ«║УДётѕЎу╗┤ТіцТђЂтњїУ«Ау«Ќт╝ЋТЊјС╣ІжЌ┤уџёу╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎУАеУЙЙсђѓуЏ«ТаЄТў»У«ЕСИџтіАС║║тЉўтЈ»С╗ЦжђџУ┐ЄУАеТа╝ТѕќТІќТІйТјДС╗Ху╗┤ТіцУДётѕЎ№╝їтљїТЌХУ«Ау«Ќт╝ЋТЊјС╗ЇуёХТііУДётѕЎу╝ќУ»ЉСИ║ CP-SAT у║дТЮЪсђѓ

| СИ╗жбў | тє│уГќ |
| --- | --- |
| у╗┤ТіцТђЂУАеУЙЙ | Тќ░тбъ `PairStructRuleSchema`сђЂ`TripleStructRuleSchema` тњї `CombinationStructRuleSchema` |
| УАеУЙЙт╝Ју▓њт║д | Сй┐уће `StructExprSchema` УАеуц║Рђют»╣У▒А + т▒ъТђД + Т»ћУЙЃугд + тђ╝РђЮ |
| уѕХтГљУДётѕЎтЁ│у│╗ | Тюг RFC С╗Їт╗║У««Тќ░тбъ `Rule.parentRuleCode`№╝ЏСИЇтцЇућеуј░ТюЅ `Rule.fatherCode`№╝їтЏаСИ║тйЊтЅЇС╗БуаЂСИГ `fatherCode` ти▓УАеуц║УДётѕЎТїѓУййуџё PartCategory |
| тЁ│у│╗у▒╗тъІ | С╗ЁС┐ЮуЋЎ `INCOMPATIBLE`сђЂ`REQUIRES`сђЂ`CO_DEPENDENT`№╝Џ`CO_DEPENDENT` тљїТЌХУАеуц║тЁ╝т«╣/жЁЇтЦЌтЁ│у│╗ |
| У┐љУАїТђЂУАеУЙЙ | Тюг RFC т╗║У««тюе `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` Тъёт╗║ТЋ░ТЇ«тљјућЪТѕљ `Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema`№╝ЏтйЊтЅЇ `Rule` у▒╗т░џТюфтїЁтљФ `parentRuleCode` / `exeSchema` |
| тЇЌтљЉТјЦтЈБУЙ╣уЋї | у╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎТЅДУАїтЎет▒ъС║јт╝ЋТЊјтєЁжЃеУЃйтіЏ№╝ЏУІЦуц║СЙІУДдУЙЙ CP т╗║ТеА№╝їт║ћСй┐уће `ModuleCPModel`сђЂ`AlgCPBoolVar`сђЂ`AlgCPLiteral`сђЂ`PartVar` уГЅ facade№╝їСИЇтєЇтюеС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│Ћ/RFC уц║СЙІСИГТџ┤жю▓ OR-Tools `BoolVar` / `Literal` |
| уЎйтљЇтЇЋу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎ | жђЅСИГуџёжЃеС╗Ху╗ётљѕт┐ЁжА╗тЉйСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђТЮАтЁЂУ«Иу╗ётљѕ |
| ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎ | Т»ЈТЮАудЂТГбу╗ётљѕућЪТѕљРђюСИЇУЃйтљїТЌХжђЅСИГРђЮуџёу║дТЮЪ |
| жђ╗УЙЉт«їтцЄТђД | У«Ау«Ќт╝ЋТЊјтЈфТЅДУАїуА«т«џУ»ГС╣Ѕ№╝Џу╗┤ТіцТђЂт«їтцЄТђДуГќуЋЦСИЇтюеТюг RFC т╗║ТеА |
| ТаАжфїТјЦтЈБ | УДётѕњтюе `ModuleConstraintExecutor` Тќ░тбъ `validate(ModuleValidateReq)`№╝ЏтйЊтЅЇТјЦтЈБС╗ЇтЈфТюЅ `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/postCalculate` |
| С║їтЁЃ/СИЅтЁЃТћ»ТїЂ | ждќТюЪТћ»ТїЂС║їтЁЃтњїСИЅтЁЃ№╝ЏТЏ┤жФўтЁЃтЈ»ућ▒тљју╗Гжђџуће `NaryStructRuleSchema` ТЅЕт▒Ћ |

---

## 1. ТЉўУдЂ

тйЊтЅЇУДётѕЎТЏ┤тЂЈтљЉС╗БуаЂт╝ЈТѕќти▓ТюЅтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎ Schema№╝їжџЙС╗ЦТћ»ТњЉт«бТѕижђџУ┐ЄУАеТа╝тїќуЋїжЮбу╗┤ТіцРђюCPU ТаИТЋ░ = 4 СИЇтЁ╝т«╣уАгуЏўжђЪујЄ = 5400РђЮУ┐Ўу▒╗у╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎсђѓТюг RFC ТЈљУ««тюе `Rule.rawCode` СИГТќ░тбъС║їтЁЃсђЂСИЅтЁЃу╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎ Schema№╝їт╣Хтюе `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` Тъёт╗║ТЋ░ТЇ«тљјт▒Ћт╝ђСИ║ `CodependantRuleSchema`№╝їСй┐у╗┤ТіцТђЂтЈ»У»╗сђЂУ┐љУАїТђЂтЈ»ТЅДУАїсђѓ

ТюгТќЄти▓ТїЅ `RFC-0005-0.1` тљјуџётЇЌтљЉТјЦтЈБжЄЇТъётѕиТќ░№╝џС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋСЙДтЁЦтЈБТў» `ModuleAlgBase.model()`№╝їCP УЃйтіЏжђџУ┐Є `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade Тџ┤жю▓№╝ї`southinf` СИЇСЙЮУхќ `impl` тїЁтњї OR-Toolsсђѓу╗ЊТъётїќу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎТюгУ║ФС╗ЇТў»т╝ЋТЊјтєЁжЃетЙЁт«ъуј░УЃйтіЏ№╝їСйєжфїТћХуц║СЙІтњїТЅДУАїС╝фС╗БуаЂСИЇтєЇСй┐ућеТЌДуџё `ConstraintAlgBase` ТѕќуЏ┤ТјЦ OR-Tools у▒╗тъІсђѓ

---

## 2. тіеТю║

### 2.1 жЌ«жбўУЃїТЎ»

т«бТѕиуџёт╝ђтЈЉС║║тЉўтИїТюЏућеу╗ЊТъётїќУАеТа╝у╗┤ТіцУДётѕЎ№╝їУђїСИЇТў»уЏ┤ТјЦу╝ќтєЎ Java С╗БуаЂТѕќУЄфућ▒УАеУЙЙт╝ЈсђѓтЁИтъІуЋїжЮбС║цС║њтдѓСИІ№╝џ

1. жђЅТІЕтидУАеУЙЙт╝Ј№╝џт»╣У▒А `cpu`№╝їт▒ъТђД `CoreNum`№╝їТЊЇСйюугд `=`№╝їтђ╝ `4`сђѓ
2. жђЅТІЕСИџтіАтЁ│у│╗№╝џСЙІтдѓРђюСИЇтЁ╝т«╣РђЮсђѓ
3. жђЅТІЕтЈ│УАеУЙЙт╝Ј№╝џт»╣У▒А `drive`№╝їт▒ъТђД `Speed`№╝їТЊЇСйюугд `=`№╝їтђ╝ `5400`сђѓ

У┐Ўу▒╗УДётѕЎТюгУ┤еСИіТў»СИђСИфС║їтЁЃу╗ЊТъётїќУАеУЙЙ№╝џ

```text
cpu.CoreNum = 4  INCOMPATIBLE  drive.Speed = 5400
```

тйЊтЅЇу│╗у╗ЪСИГ `Rule.rawCode` ти▓у╗ЈТћ»ТїЂ `CompatiableRuleSchema`сђЂ`CodeRuleSchema`сђЂ`CalculateRuleSchema` уГЅу▒╗тъІ№╝їСйєу╝║т░ЉжЮбтљЉ UI УАеТа╝у╗┤Тіцуџёжђџућеу╗ЊТъётїќУАеУЙЙТеАтъІсђѓ

### 2.2 у«ђтЇЋу╗ЊТъётїќУДётѕЎтю║ТЎ»

СИџтіАУДётѕЎ№╝џ

```text
4 ТаИ CPU СИЇтЁ╝т«╣ 5400 УйгуАгуЏў
```

у╗┤ТіцТђЂТюЪТюЏ№╝џ

```json
{
  "@type": "PairStructRule",
  "expr1": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "cpu",
    "attrCode": "CoreNum",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["4"]
  },
  "relationType": "INCOMPATIBLE",

    "objectType": "PartCategory",

```

У┐љУАїТђЂТюЪТюЏ№╝џ

- У┐ЄТ╗цтЄ║ТЅђТюЅ `CoreNum = 4` уџё CPU жЃеС╗Хсђѓ
- У┐ЄТ╗цтЄ║ТЅђТюЅ `Speed = 5400` уџёуАгуЏўжЃеС╗Хсђѓ

### 2.3 у╗ётљѕУДётѕЎтю║ТЎ»

СИџтіАУДётѕЎСИЇТђ╗Тў»тЇЋТЮАС║їтЁЃтЁ│у│╗№╝їУђїтЈ»УЃйТў»СИђу╗ёт┐ЁжА╗ТЋ┤СйЊу╗┤ТіцуџётГљУДётѕЎсђѓСЙІтдѓ CPU СИјуАгуЏўуџёжЁЇтЦЌуЎйтљЇтЇЋ№╝џ

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * тЁ╝т«╣ТђДу║дТЮЪу«ЌТ│Ћт«ъуј░у▒╗
 * тцёуљєжЃеС╗ХС╣ІжЌ┤уџёСИЇтЁ╝т«╣сђЂСЙЮУхќуГЅу║дТЮЪтЁ│у│╗
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
public class CompatibleConstraintAlg {

    /**
     * CPу║дТЮЪТ▒ѓУДБТеАтъІт«ъСЙІ
     */
    private AlgCPModel model;

    public CompatibleConstraintAlg(AlgCPModel model) {
        this.model = model;
    }

    /**
     * Ти╗тіаСИЇтЁ╝т«╣ТђДу║дТЮЪ№╝ѕжЃеС╗Ху║ДтѕФ№╝Ѕ
     * 
     * @param ruleCode       УДётѕЎС╗БуаЂ
     * @param leftPartsExpr  тидСЙДжЃеС╗ХУАеУЙЙт╝Ј
     * @param rightPartsExpr тЈ│СЙДжЃеС╗ХУАеУЙЙт╝Ј
     */
    public void addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(String ruleCode, PartsExpr leftPartsExpr,
            PartsExpr rightPartsExpr) {
        // left№╝џуА«С┐ЮтЈфТюЅСИђСИфжЃеС╗ХУбФжђЅСИГ
        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftPartsExpr.getPartVars());
        // right№╝џуА«С┐ЮтЈфТюЅСИђСИфжЃеС╗ХУбФжђЅСИГ
        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightPartsExpr.getPartVars());
        // УјитЈќтидСЙДтњїтЈ│СЙДуџёжЃеС╗ХтЈўжЄЈ
        List<PartVarImpl> leftFilterParts = leftPartsExpr.getFilterPartVars();
        List<PartVarImpl> rightFilterParts = rightPartsExpr.getFilterPartVars();
        List<PartVarImpl> leftNoFilterParts = leftPartsExpr.getNoFilterPartVars();
        List<PartVarImpl> rightNoFilterParts = rightPartsExpr.getNoFilterPartVars();

        // т«џС╣ЅтидСЙДТЮАС╗Х№╝џтидСЙДУ┐ЄТ╗цжЏєтљѕСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ
        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftFilterParts, "leftCond");

        // т«џС╣ЅтЈ│СЙДТЮАС╗Х№╝џтЈ│СЙДУ┐ЄТ╗цжЏєтљѕСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ
        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightFilterParts, "rightCond");

        // т«џС╣ЅтидСЙДжЮъТЮАС╗Х№╝џтидСЙДУ┐ЄТ╗цжЏєтљѕтцќУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ
        BoolVar leftNotCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftNoFilterParts, "leftNotCond");

        // т«џС╣ЅтЈ│СЙДжЮъТЮАС╗Х№╝џтЈ│СЙДУ┐ЄТ╗цжЏєтљѕтцќУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ
        BoolVar rightNotCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightNoFilterParts, "rightNotCond");

        // т«ъуј░IncompatibleтЈїтљЉтЁ│у│╗№╝џ
        // ТГБтљЉ1.1№╝џтдѓТъютидСЙДТЮАС╗ХСИ║true№╝їтѕЎтЈ│СЙДТЮАС╗Хт┐ЁжА╗СИ║false№╝ѕтЈ│СЙДжЮъТЮАС╗Хт┐ЁжА╗СИ║true№╝Ѕ
        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightNotCond);

        // тЈЇтљЉ2.1№╝џтдѓТъютЈ│СЙДТЮАС╗ХСИ║true№╝їтѕЎтидСЙДТЮАС╗Хт┐ЁжА╗СИ║false№╝ѕтидСЙДжЮъТЮАС╗Хт┐ЁжА╗СИ║true№╝Ѕ
        model.addImplication(rightCond, leftNotCond);

        log.info("Added inCompatible constraint: {} - left filter: {}, right filter: {}",
                ruleCode, leftFilterParts.size(), rightFilterParts.size());
    }

    private void addExactlyOneConstraint(List<PartVarImpl> partVars) {
        model.addExactlyOne(partVars.stream()
                .map(partVar -> partVar.getIsSelected())
                .toArray(Literal[]::new));
    }

    /**
     * тѕЏт╗║"жЏєтљѕСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ"уџёТЮАС╗ХтЈўжЄЈтњїу║дТЮЪ
     * 
     * @param ruleCode        УДётѕЎС╗БуаЂ
     * @param partVars        жЃеС╗ХтЈўжЄЈтѕЌУАе
     * @param conditionSuffix ТЮАС╗Хтљју╝ђ
     * @return ТЮАС╗ХтЈўжЄЈ
     */
    private BoolVar createSelectedCondition(String ruleCode, List<PartVarImpl> partVars, String conditionSuffix) {

        // т«џС╣ЅТЮАС╗ХтЈўжЄЈ
        BoolVar condition = model.newBoolVar(ruleCode + "_" + conditionSuffix);

        // УјитЈќжђЅСИГтЈўжЄЈТЋ░у╗ё
        Literal[] selected = partVars.stream()
                .map(partVar -> partVar.getIsSelected())
                .toArray(Literal[]::new);

        // тйЊТЮАС╗ХСИ║trueТЌХ№╝їжЏєтљѕСИГУЄ│т░ЉСИђСИфУбФжђЅСИГ№╝ЏтйЊСИ║falseТЌХ№╝їжЏєтљѕтЁежЃеСИЇУбФжђЅСИГ
        model.addBoolOr(selected).onlyEnforceIf(condition);
        model.addBoolAnd(Arrays.stream(selected).map(Literal::not).toArray(Literal[]::new))
                .onlyEnforceIf(condition.not());

        return condition;
    }
}
```

### 3.2 тѕєжўХТ«хжЁЇуй«№╝џТюфтє│жђЅТІЕСИЇт║ћТЈљтЅЇу║дТЮЪТѕљТюђу╗ѕжђЅТІЕ

Staged Configuration уџёуаћуЕХТііС║ДтЊЂжЁЇуй«УДєСИ║жђљТГЦТХѕжЎцтЈўСйЊуЕ║жЌ┤уџёУ┐ЄуеІсђѓућеТѕиТѕќСИЇтљїжўХТ«хуџётЈѓСИјУђЁтЈ»С╗ЦтЁѕтЂџжЃетѕєжђЅТІЕ№╝їтєЇжђљТГЦСИЊжЌетїќтѕ░Тюђу╗ѕжЁЇуй«сђѓ

т»╣Тюгу│╗у╗ЪУђїУеђ№╝їућеТѕитЈфТЈљтЄ║ CPU жюђТ▒ѓТЌХ№╝їжЁЇуй«С╗ЇуёХТў»жЃетѕєжЁЇуй«№╝џж╝аТаЄтѕєу▒╗тцёС║јТюфтє│уіХТђЂ№╝їУђїСИЇТў»ти▓жђЅТІЕуіХТђЂсђѓТГцТЌХТіі CPU СИјж╝аТаЄуЎйтљЇтЇЋтіаУййУ┐ЏСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБт╣Хт╝║тѕХж╝аТаЄтЉйСИГ№╝їС╝џТііТюфтє│уіХТђЂТЈљтЅЇУДБжЄіТѕљРђют┐ЁжА╗жђЅТІЕж╝аТаЄРђЮ№╝їУ┐ЮтЈЇтѕєжўХТ«хжЁЇуй«ТђЮТЃ│сђѓ

тЏаТГц№╝їСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБжўХТ«хт║ћтЈфт»╣тйЊтЅЇти▓у╗Јтє│уГќуџёу╗┤т║дТќйтіат╝║у║дТЮЪ№╝ЏТюфтє│тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈ»С╗Цтюетљјуй«УАЦтЁежўХТ«хућЪТѕљТЅЕт▒ЋТќ╣ТАѕсђѓ

### 3.3 CP-SAT№╝џpresence literal СИјТЮАС╗Ху║дТЮЪ

OR-Tools CP-SAT т«ўТќ╣ТќЄТАБТјеУЇљуће channeling constraints УАеУЙЙ if-then-else У┐Ўу▒╗ТЮАС╗ХтЁ│у│╗№╝їт╣ХжђџУ┐Є `OnlyEnforceIf` У«Еу║дТЮЪтЈфтюеТЪљСИфтИЃт░ћТЮАС╗ХТѕљуФІТЌХућЪТЋѕсђѓ

OR-Tools уџё optional interval С╣ЪТў»тљїСИђТђЮУи»№╝џтї║жЌ┤Тў»тљдтГўтюеућ▒ presence literal ТјДтѕХ№╝їСИЇТ┤╗УиЃуџё interval С╝џУбФуЏИтЁ│у║дТЮЪт┐йуЋЦсђѓ

У┐Ўу╗ЎТюгу│╗у╗Ъуџётљ»тЈЉТў»№╝џтЈ»жђЅ `PartCategory` тЈ»С╗Цт╗║ТеАСИ║СИђСИф presence тИЃт░ћжЄЈ№╝џ

```text
mouse.present = 1  УАеуц║ж╝аТаЄтѕєу▒╗тЈѓСИјтйЊтЅЇУДБ
mouse.present = 0  УАеуц║ж╝аТаЄтѕєу▒╗СИЇтЈѓСИјтйЊтЅЇУДБ
```

уЎйтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎСИЇт║ћУБИтЦћТЅДУАї№╝їУђїт║ћтЈўТѕљ№╝џ

```text

  (cpu, mouse) in allowedTuples
```

т»╣С║јт┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝ї`present` ТЂњСИ║ 1№╝Џт»╣С║јтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝ї`present` ућ▒У»иТ▒ѓсђЂуГќуЋЦТѕќУБѓтЈўжўХТ«хтє│т«џсђѓ

### 3.4 CP-SAT№╝џуЎйтљЇтЇЋ/ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋтЈ»Тўат░ётѕ░ table constraint

OR-Tools Java API ТЈљСЙЏ `addAllowedAssignments` тњї `addForbiddenAssignments`сђѓтЅЇУђЁУАеУЙЙтЁЂУ«И tuple жЏєтљѕ№╝їтљјУђЁУАеУЙЙудЂТГб tuple жЏєтљѕсђѓ

У┐ЎСИј `RFC-0007` уџё `CodependantRuleSchema` тЙѕУ┤┤тљѕ№╝џ

- WHITE тЈ»Тўат░ёСИ║ allowed assignmentsсђѓ
- BLACK тЈ»Тўат░ёСИ║ forbidden assignmentsсђѓ
- СйєтљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХ№╝їtable constraint С╗Їт┐ЁжА╗ућ▒ presence guard ТјДтѕХ№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇу╝║тИГу╗┤т║дУДдтЈЉт╝║тѕХжђЅТІЕсђѓ

Т│еТёЈ№╝џУ┐ЎТў»т╝ЋТЊјтєЁжЃет«ъуј░тђЎжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ№╝їСИЇТў»тйЊтЅЇтЇЌтљЉтЁгт╝ђ APIсђѓ`ModuleCPModel` уЏ«тЅЇТ▓АТюЅТџ┤жю▓ table constraint Тќ╣Т│Ћ№╝ЏУІЦТюфТЮЦжюђУдЂТіі table constraint СйюСИ║тЇЌтљЉУЃйтіЏ№╝їжюђУдЂтЁѕтюе `com.jmix.executor.southinf.cp` СИГтбътіауе│т«џ facade№╝їт╣Хућ▒ `SouthboundLatestBridge` жђѓжЁЇтѕ░тєЁжЃе OR-Toolsсђѓ

### 3.5 У░Ѓуаћу╗ЊУ«║

у╗╝тљѕС╗ЦСИіУхёТќЎ№╝їтЈ»жђЅжЃеС╗ХУДётѕЎуџёуе│т«џУ«ЙУ«Ат║ћТ╗АУХ│СИЅТЮАтјЪтѕЎ№╝џ

3. **СИ╗жЁЇуй«СИјтЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁетЈ»С╗ЦтѕєжўХТ«х**№╝џтйЊућеТѕиТюфТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХ№╝їСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБСИЇт║ћУбФтЈ»жђЅУДётѕЎТІќтЁЦТЌаУДБ№╝ЏтЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁетЈ»С╗ЦСйюСИ║тљјуй«тѕєТћ»ућЪТѕљсђѓ

## 4. Тю»У»ГСИјУ»ГС╣Ѕт«џС╣Ѕ

### 4.1 PartCategory жђЅТІЕуГќуЋЦ

уЏ«ТаЄТќ░тбътѕєу▒╗жђЅТІЕуГќуЋЦ№╝џ

```java

    REQUIRED,

т╗║У««тюе `PartCategory` СИітбътіатГЌТ«х№╝џ

| OPTIONAL | `sum(selected) == 0 or sum(selected) >= 1`№╝ЏтйЊУ»иТ▒ѓУдЂТ▒ѓ present ТЌХтіа `sum(selected) >= 1` |

### 4.2 present У»ГС╣Ѕ

т»╣Т»ЈСИфтѕєу▒╗т«џС╣ЅУ┐љУАїТђЂтГўтюеТђД№╝џ

```text
category.present = sum(part.selected for part in category.parts) >= 1
```

ждќТюЪтЇЋт«ъСЙІтѕєу▒╗т╗║У««у║дТЮЪтдѓСИІ№╝џ

| тѕєу▒╗уГќуЋЦ | у║дТЮЪ |
| --- | --- |
| REQUIRED | `sum(selected) >= 1`№╝їтЁиСйЊТў»тљд exactly one С╗Їућ▒жђЅТІЕУДётѕЎТјДтѕХ |
| OPTIONAL | `sum(selected) == 0 or sum(selected) >= 1`№╝ЏтйЊУ»иТ▒ѓУдЂТ▒ѓ present ТЌХтіа `sum(selected) >= 1` |
| OPTIONAL + тЇЋжђЅ | `sum(selected) <= 1`№╝Џpresent ТЌХ `sum(selected) == 1` |

P0 СИЇт╝║тѕХСИђТгАжЄЇТъёТЅђТюЅтѕєу▒╗жђЅТІЕу║дТЮЪсђѓтЁ│жћ«Тў»тЁ╝т«╣/у╗ётљѕУДётѕЎСИЇтЙЌУЄфти▒жЎётИд `ExactlyOne` ТіітЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТІЅТѕљт┐ЁжђЅсђѓ

### 4.3 УДётѕЎТ┐ђТ┤╗ guard

СИђТЮАу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎуџё guard ућ▒тЈѓСИју╗┤т║дуџё present уіХТђЂу╗ёТѕљ№╝џ

```text
rule.active = all(category.present for category in rule.dimensionCategoryCodes)
```

тдѓТъюТЅђТюЅу╗┤т║джЃйТў»т┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝ї`rule.active` ТЂњСИ║ trueсђѓ

тдѓТъютГўтюетЈ»жђЅу╗┤т║д№╝їтѕЎ№╝џ

- ућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓУ»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХ№╝їУ»Цтѕєу▒╗ `present` УбФт╝║тѕХСИ║ trueсђѓ
- ућеТѕиТюфУдЂТ▒ѓУ»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХ№╝їСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБжўХТ«хСИЇт╝║тѕХтЁХ presentсђѓ
- тљјуй«УБѓтЈўуџёРђютИдтЈ»жђЅС╗ХРђЮтѕєТћ»С╝џт╝║тѕХУ»Цтѕєу▒╗ present№╝їт╣ХтіаУйй/ТЅДУАїуЏИтЁ│УДётѕЎсђѓ

### 4.4 уЎйтљЇтЇЋ guard У»ГС╣Ѕ

уЎйтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎ№╝џ

```text
WHITE(cpu, mouse):
  (cpu1, mouse1)
  (cpu2, mouse2)
```

У»ГС╣Ѕ№╝џ

```text
if cpu.present && mouse.present:
    selectedTuple(cpu, mouse) must be in allowedTuples
else:
    rule is inactive
```

тЇ│№╝џж╝аТаЄСИЇтЄ║уј░ТЌХ№╝їСИЇУдЂТ▒ѓтЉйСИГ CPU + ж╝аТаЄуЎйтљЇтЇЋ№╝Џж╝аТаЄСИђТЌдтЄ║уј░№╝їт┐ЁжА╗тЉйСИГсђѓ

### 4.5 ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋ guard У»ГС╣Ѕ

ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋУДётѕЎ№╝џ

```text
BLACK(cpu, mouse):
  (cpu1, mouse2)
```

У»ГС╣Ѕ№╝џ

```text
if cpu.present && mouse.present:
    selectedTuple(cpu, mouse) must not be in forbiddenTuples
else:
    rule is inactive or vacuously satisfied
```

ж╗ЉтљЇтЇЋСИЇтЙЌжЎётИд `ExactlyOne(mouse)`сђѓтдѓТъюж╝аТаЄ absent№╝їтѕЎ `(cpu1, mouse2)` СИЇтЈ»УЃйтЉйСИГ№╝їУДётѕЎУЄфуёХжђџУ┐Єсђѓ

### 6.3 УДётѕЎтіаУййуГќуЋЦ

```java
public enum RuleLoadDecision {
    LOAD_IN_MAIN_SOLVE,
    LOAD_IN_OPTIONAL_AUGMENTATION,
    SKIP
}
```

```java
RuleLoadDecision decide(Rule rule, RequestContext req, PricePolicy pricePolicy) {
    RuleActivation activation = analyzer.analyze(rule, module);
    if (activation.optionalCategoryCodes().isEmpty()) {
        return LOAD_IN_MAIN_SOLVE;
    }

    if (req.requiresAny(activation.optionalCategoryCodes())) {
        return LOAD_IN_MAIN_SOLVE;
    }

    if (pricePolicy == PricePolicy.MAX) {
        return LOAD_IN_MAIN_SOLVE;
    }

    return LOAD_IN_OPTIONAL_AUGMENTATION;
}
```

У┐ЎжЄї `requiresAny` ждќТюЪтЈ»т«џС╣ЅСИ║№╝џ

- У»иТ▒ѓТўЙт╝ЈтБ░ТўјУ»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗т┐ЁжА╗жЁЇуй«сђѓ
- У»иТ▒ѓТўЙт╝ЈтБ░ТўјУ»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗т┐ЁжА╗жЁЇуй«сђѓ

С╗ЁтїЁтљФт▒ъТђДУ┐ЄТ╗цТѕќТјњт║ЈуГќуЋЦТЌХ№╝їСИЇуГЅтљїС║јРђют┐ЁжА╗жЁЇуй«У»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗РђЮ№╝їСйєУ»┤ТўјућеТѕитЁ│т┐ЃУ┐ЎСИфтѕєу▒╗сђѓP0 т║ћућЪТѕљ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тђЎжђЅ№╝џabsent тѕєТћ»УАеуц║СИЇжЁЇуй«У»ЦтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝Џpresent тѕєТћ»т┐ЁжА╗Т╗АУХ│У┐ЄТ╗цТѕќТјњт║ЈуГќуЋЦ№╝їт╣Хтюеу╗ЊТъюТјњт║ЈСИГСйЊуј░уГќуЋЦтй▒тЊЇсђѓ

            List<Rule> optionalRules,
            OptionalAugmentPolicy policy) {
        // 1. absent branch: тцЇтѕХСИ╗УДБ№╝їТаЄУ«░тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТюфжЁЇуй«

    }
}

ждќТюЪу║дТЮЪ№╝џ

        return resultPartCategory;

    private static Optional<IPart> createPartFromField(Field field, Map<String, IPart> partMap) {
        PartAnno partAnno = field.getAnnotation(PartAnno.class);
        if (partAnno == null) {
            return Optional.empty();
        }

        // Та╣ТЇ«тГЌТ«ху▒╗тъІтє│т«џжЃеС╗Ху▒╗тъІ
        IPart ipart = null;
        if (isPartCategoryVarField(field)) {
            PartCategory part = new PartCategory();
            ipart = part;
            part.setPartType(PartType.CATEGORY);
            part.setDefaultValue(0); // Partуџёж╗ўУ«цтђ╝у▒╗тъІТў»Integer
            part.setDescription(partAnno.description());
            part.setSortNo(partAnno.sortNo());
            // part.setMaxQuantity(partAnno.maxQuantity());
            // part.setPrice(partAnno.price());
            part.setExtSchema(partAnno.extSchema());
        } else {
            // PartVar т»╣т║ћ ATOMIC у▒╗тъІ№╝їСИЇт║ћУ»ЦТюЅ dynAttrSchemas
            Part part = new Part();
            ipart = part;
            part.setPartType(PartType.ATOMIC);
            // уА«С┐Ю ATOMIC у▒╗тъІуџёжЃеС╗ХТ▓АТюЅ dynAttrSchemas
            part.setDynAttrSchemas(new ArrayList<>());
            part.setDefaultValue(0); // Partуџёж╗ўУ«цтђ╝у▒╗тъІТў»Integer
            part.setDescription(partAnno.description());
            part.setSortNo(partAnno.sortNo());
            part.setMaxQuantity(partAnno.maxQuantity());
            part.setPrice(partAnno.price());
            part.setExtSchema(partAnno.extSchema());
        }

        // ућЪТѕљPart.code
        String fieldName = field.getName();
        String code = fieldName.replace("Var", "");
        ipart.setCode(code);

        // У«Йуй«тЁХС╗ќт▒ъТђД
        ipart.setFatherCode(partAnno.fatherCode());

        // тцёуљєУДёТа╝т▒ъТђД
        if (partAnno.attrs().length > 0 && ipart.getPartType() == PartType.ATOMIC && ipart.getFatherCode() != null) {
            PartCategory fatherPartCategory = (PartCategory) partMap.get(ipart.getFatherCode());
            Map<String, String> attrs = parseAttributes(partAnno.attrs(),
                    fatherPartCategory.queryDynAttrSchemas4NotInst());
            ipart.setDynAttr(attrs);

            // тцёуљєт«ъСЙІУДёТа╝т▒ъТђД
            processInstanceAttrs(ipart, partAnno, fatherPartCategory.queryDynAttrSchemas4Inst());
        }

        // тцёуљєТЅЕт▒Ћт▒ъТђД
        if (partAnno.extAttrs().length > 0) {
            Map<String, String> extAttrs = parseAttributes(partAnno.extAttrs(), new ArrayList<>());
            ipart.setExtAttrs(extAttrs);
        }

        // У«Йуй«т«ъСЙІу╝ќуаЂ№╝ѕућеС║јтцџт«ъСЙІтѕєу▒╗тцёуљє№╝Ѕ
        MultiInstCategoryUtils.setInstcodes(partAnno, ipart);

        // тцёуљєтіеТђЂт▒ъТђДТ│еУДБ№╝ѕтЈфТюЅCATEGORYу▒╗тъІуџёжЃеС╗ХТЅЇжюђУдЂ№╝Ѕ
        if (ipart.getPartType() == PartType.CATEGORY) {
            processDynamicAttributeAnnotations(field, (PartCategory) ipart);
            // у╗ДТЅ┐уџёт▒ъТђДтюетљјжЮб№╝їТќ╣СЙ┐т«ъСЙІт▒ъТђДуГЅтцёуљє
            processInheritance(field, ipart, partMap);

     * С╗јТќ╣Т│ЋСИГтѕЏт╗║УДётѕЎ
     * 
     * @param moduleAlgClazz ТеАтЮЌу«ЌТ│Ћу▒╗
     * @param module         ТеАтЮЌт»╣У▒А
     * @return тѕЏт╗║уџёУДётѕЎтѕЌУАе№╝ѕС╗ЁтїЁтљФТи╗тіатѕ░ModuleуџёУДётѕЎ№╝Ѕ
     */
    private static List<Rule> createRulesFromMethods(Class<?> moduleAlgClazz, Module module) {
        List<Rule> moduleRules = new ArrayList<>();

        // жЂЇтјєТЅђТюЅТќ╣Т│Ћ
        for (Method method : moduleAlgClazz.getDeclaredMethods()) {
            // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдТюЅCompatiableRuleAnnoТ│еУДБ
            CompatiableRuleAnno compatiableRuleAnno = method.getAnnotation(CompatiableRuleAnno.class);
            if (compatiableRuleAnno != null) {
                addAttrParaToModuleOrPartCategory(compatiableRuleAnno.fatherCode(),
                        parseAndAddAttrParas(compatiableRuleAnno.attrParaCodes()), module);
                Rule rule = createCompatibleRule(method, compatiableRuleAnno, module);
                if (rule != null) {
                    // CompatiableRuleAnno Т▓АТюЅ fatherCode№╝їж╗ўУ«цТи╗тіатѕ░ Module
                    moduleRules.add(rule);
                }
            }

            // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдТюЅPriorityRuleAnnoТ│еУДБ
            PriorityRuleAnno priorityRuleAnno = method.getAnnotation(PriorityRuleAnno.class);
            if (priorityRuleAnno != null) {
                addAttrParaToModuleOrPartCategory(priorityRuleAnno.fatherCode(),
                        parseAndAddAttrParas(priorityRuleAnno.attrParaCodes()), module);
                Rule rule = createPriorityRule(method, priorityRuleAnno, module);
                if (rule != null) {
                    addRuleToModuleOrPartCategory(rule, module, moduleRules);
                }
            }

            // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдТюЅCodeRuleAnnoТ│еУДБ
            CodeRuleAnno codeRuleAnno = method.getAnnotation(CodeRuleAnno.class);
            if (codeRuleAnno != null) {
                addAttrParaToModuleOrPartCategory(codeRuleAnno.fatherCode(),
                        parseAndAddAttrParas(codeRuleAnno.attrParaCodes()), module);
                Rule rule = createCodeRule(method, codeRuleAnno, module);
                if (rule != null) {
                    addRuleToModuleOrPartCategory(rule, module, moduleRules);
                }
            }
        }

        return moduleRules;
    }

    private static void addAttrParaToModuleOrPartCategory(String fatherCode, List<AttrPara> attrParas, Module module) {
        if (attrParas.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(fatherCode)) {
            // fatherCode СИ║ null ТѕќуЕ║тГЌугдСИ▓№╝їТи╗тіатѕ░ Module
            module.getAttrParas().addAll(deleteDuplicate(module.getAttrParas(), attrParas));
        } else {
            // fatherCode СИЇСИ║уЕ║№╝їТи╗тіатѕ░т»╣т║ћуџё PartCategory
            IPart part = module.getPart(fatherCode);
            if (part instanceof PartCategory) {
                PartCategory partCategory = (PartCategory) part;
                partCategory.getAttrParas().addAll(deleteDuplicate(partCategory.getAttrParas(), attrParas));
            } else {
                log.error("PartCategory '{}' not found for attrParas '{}'..., adding to Module instead",
                        fatherCode, attrParas.get(0).getAttrCode());
                throw new AlgLoaderException("PartCategory '" + fatherCode + "' not found for attrParas '"
                        + attrParas.get(0).getAttrCode() + "...', adding to Module instead");
            }
        }
    }

    private static List<AttrPara> deleteDuplicate(List<AttrPara> existAttrParas, List<AttrPara> newAttrParas) {
        Set<String> attrCodes = existAttrParas.stream()
                .map(attrPara -> attrPara.getAttrCode() + ":" + attrPara.getType()).collect(Collectors.toSet());
        return newAttrParas.stream()
                .filter(attrPara -> !

    }

     */
    @Test
    public void testErr001_CpuFilterEmpty_DriveOk() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=8",
                "drive: where Speed=5400");

        assertSoluContain("cpu:FILTER_EMPTY");
    }

     */
    @Test
    public void testErr001_CpuOk_DriveFilterEmpty() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
                "drive: where Speed=7200");
        printSolutions();

        assertSoluContain("drive:FILTER_EMPTY");

    @Test

        inferRecommendModule(

        assertSoluContain("cpu4");

        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=8",
                "drive: where Speed=7200");
        printSolutions();

        resultAssert().assertCodeEqual(Result.NO_SOLUTION);
    }

    private static void injectPartCategoryErrors(List<ModuleInst> solutions,
            Map<String, ErrorInfo> errorInfoMap) {
        if (errorInfoMap == null || errorInfoMap.isEmpty() || solutions == null) {
            return;
        }
        for (ModuleInst solution : solutions) {
            for (Map.Entry<String, ErrorInfo> entry : errorInfoMap.entrySet()) {
                String key = entry.getKey();
                ErrorInfo errorInfo = entry.getValue();
                // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдти▓тГўтюет»╣т║ћуџё PartCategoryInst
                boolean found = false;
                for (PartCategoryInst pcInst : solution.getPartCategorys()) {
                    if (pcInst.getCode().equals(key)) {
                        pcInst.setErrorCode(errorInfo.errorCode());
                        pcInst.setErrorMessage(errorInfo.errorMessage());
                        found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!found) {
                    // тѕЏт╗║Тќ░уџё PartCategoryInst ТЅ┐УййжћЎУ»»С┐АТЂ»
                    PartCategoryInst errorInst = new PartCategoryInst();
                    errorInst.setCode(key);
                    errorInst.setErrorCode(errorInfo.errorCode());
                    errorInst.setErrorMessage(errorInfo.errorMessage());
                    solution.addPartCategoryInst(errorInst);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    /**

     * уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░№╝џТюђт░ЈтїќжюђУдЂТЮЙт╝Џуџёу║дТЮЪТЋ░жЄЈ№╝ѕтИдТЮЃжЄЇ№╝Ѕ
     */
    public void addRelaxObjectFunction() {
        if (!model.isIsAttachRelax()) {
            return;
        }

        // уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░№╝џТюђт░ЈтїќжюђУдЂТЮЙт╝Џуџёу║дТЮЪТЋ░жЄЈ№╝ѕтИдТЮЃжЄЇ№╝Ѕ
        List<RelaxVar> relaxVars = new ArrayList<>(model.getRelaxVarMap().values());
        if (!relaxVars.isEmpty()) {
            // Тъёт╗║тіаТЮЃуЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░№╝џmin(relaxVar[0].value * relaxVar[0].weight + relaxVar[1].value *
            // relaxVar[1].weight + ...)
            AlgCPLinearExpr[] weightedTerms = new AlgCPLinearExpr[relaxVars.size()];
            for (int i = 0; i < relaxVars.size(); i++) {
                RelaxVar relaxVar = relaxVars.get(i);
                weightedTerms[i] = AlgCPLinearExpr.term(relaxVar.getValue(), relaxVar.getWeight());
            }
            AlgCPLinearExpr objectiveExpr = AlgCPLinearExpr.sum(weightedTerms);
            model.minimize(objectiveExpr);
            log.info("relax: -----relaxation objective function with {} relaxation variables", relaxVars.size());
        }
    }

    /**
     * ТЅДУАїтЇЋСИфУДётѕЎТќ╣Т│Ћ
     *

    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, Method method) {
        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, this);
        executeRuleMethod(rule, this, method);
        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, null);
    }

    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, Object moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
        if (method == null) {
            log.error("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
        }
        try {
            // У«Йуй«тйЊтЅЇТЮЙт╝ЏтЈўжЄЈтљЇуД░
            this.model.setRelax4CustomRule(rule.getCode());

            // ТЅДУАїУДётѕЎТќ╣Т│Ћ
            method.setAccessible(true);
            method.invoke(moduleAlgFile);
            log.info("Executed rule method: {}", method.getName());
        } catch (IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {
            log.error("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
        }
    }

    protected void initAll(Object moduleAlgFile) {
        if (module == null) {
            log.warn("Module is null, skip initAll");

        // тѕЮтДІтїќТЅђТюЅparas
        for (Para para : module.getParas()) {
            ParaVarImpl paraVar = initParaVar(para);

        log.info("Initialized {} para variables", paraMap.size());

        // тѕЮтДІтїќТЅђТюЅparts№╝ѕтјЪтГљжЃеС╗Х№╝Ѕ
        for (Part part : module.getAtomicParts()) {

        }

    protected void newAttrParaVar(List<AttrPara> attrParas) {
        if (attrParas == null || attrParas.isEmpty()) {

    /**
     * Та╣ТЇ«module.getAllRules()Тъёт╗║ТЅђТюЅУДётѕЎТќ╣Т│ЋуџёТўат░ё
     *
     * @param module ТеАтЮЌт»╣У▒А
     * @return УДётѕЎС╗БуаЂтѕ░Тќ╣Т│Ћт»╣У▒АуџёТўат░ё
     */
    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module) {
        return buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
    }

    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module, Object moduleAlgFile) {
        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null) {
            return new HashMap<>();
        }

        // УјитЈќтйЊтЅЇу▒╗уџёТЅђТюЅТќ╣Т│Ћ
        Method[] methods = moduleAlgFile.getClass().getDeclaredMethods();
        Map<String, Method> allMethods = new HashMap<>();

        // Тъёт╗║Тќ╣Т│ЋтљЇтѕ░Methodт»╣У▒АуџёТўат░ё
        for (Method method : methods) {
            allMethods.put(method.getName(), method);
        }

        // Та╣ТЇ«module.getAllRules()ТЮЦТъёт╗║ruleMethods
        Map<String, Method> ruleMethods = new HashMap<>();
        for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
            Method method = allMethods.get(ruleCode);
            if (method != null) {
                ruleMethods.put(ruleCode, method);
                log.info("Built rule method mapping: {} -> {}", ruleCode, method.getName());
                // // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдТў»PriorityRule№╝їтдѓТъюТў»тѕЎТъёт╗║С╝ўтЁѕу║Ду║дТЮЪ
                // if (RuleTypeConstants.isPriorityRule(rule.getRuleSchemaTypeFullName())) {
                // buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
                // }
            } else {
                log.warn("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
            }
        }

        log.info("Built {} rule methods from module rules", ruleMethods.size());
        return ruleMethods;
    }

    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(IModule module) {
        module.getPriorityRules().forEach(rule -> buildPriorityConstraint(rule));
        for (Rule rule : module.getPriorityRules()) {
            buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Тъёт╗║С╝ўтЁѕу║Ду║дТЮЪ
     * 
     * @param rule УДётѕЎт»╣У▒А
     */
    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(Rule rule) {
        if (rule.getRawCode() == null || !(rule.getRawCode() instanceof PriorityRuleSchema)) {
            log.warn("Rule rawCode is not PriorityRuleSchema for rule: {}", rule.getCode());
            return;
        }
        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = new PriorityConstraint();
        pConstraint.setRule(rule);
        setPriorityConstraint(pConstraint);
    }

    /**
     * т░єтЈўжЄЈтєЎтЏътГЌТ«х№╝їС┐ЮУ»ЂУДётѕЎСй┐ућетЈўжЄЈТў»тљїСИђСИф
     */
    protected void writeBackToFields(Object moduleAlgFile) {
        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = getAllFieldVariables(moduleAlgFile);
        // тцёуљєPartVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, PartVarImpl> entry : partMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            PartVarImpl partVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Object tVar = newPartVarForModuleField(moduleAlgFile, partVar, field);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }

        // тцёуљєParaVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, ParaVarImpl> entry : paraMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            ParaVarImpl paraVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Object tVar = newParaVarForModuleField(moduleAlgFile, paraVar, field);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }
    }

    private Object newPartVarForModuleField(Object moduleAlgFile, PartVarImpl internalPartVar, Field field) {
        if (moduleAlgFile instanceof ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl) {
            return algFileImpl.newPartVarForField(internalPartVar, field);
        }
        if (moduleAlgFile instanceof ModuleAlgBase southboundAlg) {
            return SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter.newPartVarForField(southboundAlg, internalPartVar, field);
        }
        return newPartVarForField(internalPartVar, field);
    }

    private Object newParaVarForModuleField(Object moduleAlgFile, ParaVarImpl internalParaVar, Field field) {
        if (moduleAlgFile instanceof ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl) {
            return algFileImpl.newParaVarForField(internalParaVar, field);
        }
        if (moduleAlgFile instanceof ModuleAlgBase southboundAlg) {
            return SouthboundModuleAlgAdapter.newParaVarForField(southboundAlg, internalParaVar, field);
        }
        return newParaVarForField(internalParaVar, field);
    }

package com.jmix.executor.impl;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.IModule;

import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolver;
import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolverStatus;
import com.google.ortools.sat.SatParameters;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

/**
 * ТеАтЮЌтЪ║уАђу║дТЮЪТЅДУАїтЎеТійУ▒Ау▒╗
 * ТЈљСЙЏТеАтЮЌу║дТЮЪТЅДУАїуџётЁгтЁ▒тіЪУЃй
 *
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Slf4j
public abstract class ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {

    protected Module module;

    protected ConstraintConfig config;

    protected ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader;

    public void init(Module module, ConstraintConfig config,
            ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader) {
        this.module = module;
        this.config = config;
        this.moduleAlgClassLoader = moduleAlgClassLoader;
    }

    /**
     * ТЅДУАїу║дТЮЪтцёуљєуџёСИ╗Тќ╣Т│Ћ№╝їућ▒тГљу▒╗т«ъуј░
     *
     * @param partCategoryReq жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗У»иТ▒ѓ
     * @return тцёуљєу╗ЊТъю
     */
    public abstract Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq);

    /**
     * Т▒ѓУДБу║дТЮЪТеАтъІт╣ХУ┐ћтЏъу╗ЊТъю№╝ѕТЌаС╝ўтЁѕу║Ду║дТЮЪ№╝Ѕ
     *
     * @param filteredModuleBase У┐ЄТ╗цтљјуџёТеАтЮЌтЪ║уАђ
     * @param partCategoryReq    жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗У»иТ▒ѓ
     * @return Т▒ѓУДБу╗ЊТъю
     */
    protected SolverResult solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
        log.info("no Priority-process starting........");
        return invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
    }

    /**
     * СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБТќ╣Т│Ћ-тИдС╝ўтЁѕу║Ду║дТЮЪ
     */
    protected SolverResult solveWithPriorityConstraints(
            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
        log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step1 max/min starting........");
        // ТГЦжфц1№╝џт»╣Т»ЈСИфС╝ўтЁѕу║ДУДётѕЎС╝ўтїќТ▒ѓУДБТюђС╝ўУДБ minimize(objecFun)
        SolverResult result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);

        if (!result.hasSolution()) {
            result.setMessage("Cannot find solution in first step");
            return result;
        }

        // ТГЦжфц2№╝џтюеС┐ЮТїЂжФўС╝ўтЁѕу║ДуЏ«ТаЄТјЦУ┐ЉТюђС╝ўуџётЅЇТЈљСИІ№╝їт»╗ТЅЙтцџСИфУДБ№╝їobjecFun <=
        // ajustObjectValue(СИЇТќГУ░ЃТЋ┤ajustObjectValue)
        final int maxExecTimes = 5; // ТюђтцДТЅДУАїТгАТЋ░,
        final int availableSolutionNum = 5; // тЈ»УАїУДБуџёТа╝т╝Ј
        final int minSolutionThreshold = 3; // Тюђт░ЉУДБТЋ░жЄЈжўѕтђ╝
        int execTimes = 0;
        double baseAdjustCoeff = 0.5; // тЪ║уАђУ░ЃТЋ┤у│╗ТЋ░
        double objectValue = result.getObjectiveValue();
        boolean needIncreased = true; // Тў»тљджюђУдЂтбътіаobjectvalue
        int needIncreasedTimes = 0;
        do {
            execTimes++;
            SolverResult lastResult = result;
            // Та╣ТЇ«СИіСИђТгАТ▒ѓУДБу╗ЊТъютіеТђЂУ░ЃТЋ┤уГќуЋЦ
            if (execTimes > 1) {
                if (lastResult.isHasSearchMax()) {
                    // objectValueУ«Йуй«тцфтцД№╝їТюђС╝ўУДБжЃйТ▓АТюЅтцёуљє№╝їу│╗ТЋ░жюђУдЂтЙђСИІУ░Ѓ
                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 0.7; // жЎЇСйјУ░ЃТЋ┤т╣Ёт║д
                    needIncreased = false;
                    needIncreasedTimes = 0;
                    log.info(
                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: objective value too high, reducing adjustment coefficient to {}",
                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
                } else if (lastResult.getSolutions().size() < minSolutionThreshold) {
                    // УДБТЋ░жЄЈтцфт░Љ№╝їobjectValueУ«Йуй«тцфт░Ј№╝їу│╗ТЋ░жюђУдЂтЙђСИіУ░Ѓ
                    needIncreasedTimes++;
                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 3 * needIncreasedTimes;
                    needIncreased = true;
                    log.info(
                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: too few solutions found, increasing adjustment coefficient to {}",
                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
                } else {
                    log.info("xxxx");
                    break;
                }
            }
            // Та╣ТЇ«СИіСИђТгАУ░ЃТЋ┤Тќ╣тљЉтє│т«џТюгТгАУ░ЃТЋ┤
... (truncated)

package com.jmix.executor.model;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrParaType;

import java.util.List;

import lombok.Data;

/**
 * жЃеС╗Ху║дТЮЪУ»иТ▒ѓ
 * ућеС║јт«џС╣ЅжЃеС╗ХТЪЦУ»буџёу║дТЮЪТЮАС╗Х
 *
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
@Data
public class PartConstraintReq {
    /**
     * т▒ъТђДу▒╗тъІ
     */
    private AttrParaType attrType = AttrParaType.Sum;

    /**
     * т▒ъТђДС╗БуаЂ
     */
    private String attrCode;

    /**
     * т▒ъТђДТ»ћУЙЃугд
     */
    private String attrComparator;

    /**
     * т▒ъТђДтђ╝
     */
    private String attrValue;

    /**
     * т▒ъТђДУ┐ЄТ╗цТЮАС╗Х
     */
    private String attrWhereCondition;

    /**
     * жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗С╗БуаЂ№╝ѕућеС║јТЪЦУ»бТЌХТїЄт«џтЁиСйЊуџёPartCategory№╝Ѕ
     */
    private String partCategoryCode;

    /**
     * тє│уГќуГќуЋЦтѕЌУАе
     * ућеС║јТїЄт«џУ»ЦжЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗уџётЈўжЄЈтѕєТћ»жА║т║Ј
     */
    private List<StrategyConfig> decisionStrategies;

    /**
     * ућЪТѕљуЪГтГЌугдСИ▓УАеуц║
     * Та╝т╝Ј№╝џpartCategoryCode:attrCode attrComparator attrValue where
     * attrWhereCondition
     * уц║СЙІ№╝џ"drive:Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed like %5400%"
     * 
     * @return уЪГтГЌугдСИ▓УАеуц║
     */
    public String toShortString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();

        // Ти╗тіажЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗С╗БуаЂ
        if (partCategoryCode != null && !partCategoryCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(partCategoryCode).append(":");
        }

        // Ти╗тіат▒ъТђДС╗БуаЂсђЂТ»ћУЙЃугдтњїтђ╝
        if (attrCode != null && !attrCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(attrCode);
            if (attrComparator != null && !attrComparator.isEmpty() && attrValue != null && !attrValue.isEmpty()) {
                sb.append(" ").append(attrComparator);
                // Т»ћУЙЃугдтњїтђ╝С╣ІжЌ┤СИЇтіауЕ║Та╝№╝їСЙІтдѓ ">=5" УђїСИЇТў» ">= 5"
                sb.append(attrValue);
            }
        }

        // Ти╗тіа where ТЮАС╗Х
        if (attrWhereCondition != null && !attrWhereCondition.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(" where ").append(attrWhereCondition);
        }

        return sb.toString();
    }
}

@Slf4j
public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {

    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();

    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();

    private ConstraintConfig config;

    @Override
    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
        this.config = config;
        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public final Result<Void> fini() {
        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
        moduleMap.clear();
        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
        if (modules == null) {
            return Result.failed("modules is null");
        }
        for (Module m : modules) {
            if (m == null) {
                continue;
            }
            if (m.getAlg() == null) {
                return Result.failed("module alg artifact is null for module: " + m.getCode());
            }
            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
            m.init();
            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
            try {
                loader.init();
            } catch (AlgLoaderException ex) {
                return Result.failed(ex.getMessage());
            }
            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
        }
        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId) {
        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.remove(moduleId);
        moduleMap.remove(moduleId);
        log.info("Removed module: {}", moduleId);
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
    }

            IModule module) {
        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizedReqs = new HashMap<>();
        if (orgReqs == null) {
            return normalizedReqs;
        }
        for (PartConstraintReq orgReq : orgReqs) {
            List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode());

/**
 * жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗у║дТЮЪТЅДУАїтЎет«ъуј░у▒╗
 * СИЊжЌетцёуљєжЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗уЏИтЁ│уџёу║дТЮЪТ▒ѓУДБ
 *
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Slf4j
public class PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {

    public PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl() {
    }

    /**
     * тцёуљєжЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗у║дТЮЪ
     *
     * @param partCategoryReq жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗У»иТ▒ѓ
     * @return Тјеуљєу╗ЊТъю
     */
    @Override
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
        try {
            // ТЪЦТЅЙтјЪтДІжЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗
            PartCategory originalCategory = module.getPartCategory(partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
            if (originalCategory == null) {
                log.error("PartCategory not found: {}", partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
                return Result.failed("PartCategory not found: " + partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
            }
            log.info("Priority-orginal aparts: {}", originalCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString());
            // жЂЇтјєТЅђТюЅжЃеС╗Ху║дТЮЪУ»иТ▒ѓ№╝їжђљТГЦУ┐ЄТ╗ц
            PartCategory filteredCategory = originalCategory;
            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
            for (PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq : partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs()) {
                // СИђТЮАpartConstraintReqС╝џУбФТІєтѕєСИцТЮАУДётѕЎ№╝їСИђТЮАТў»У┐ЄТ╗цУДётѕЎ№╝ѕТа╣ТЇ«whereТЮАС╗ХУ┐ЄТ╗ц№╝Ѕ№╝їСИђТЮАТў»у║дТЮЪУДётѕЎ№╝ѕТа╣ТЇ«attrCode,
                // attrComparator, attrValueТъёт╗║у║дТЮЪУАеУЙЙт╝Ј№╝Ѕ
                // ТЪЦУ»бТ╗АУХ│ТЮАС╗ХуџёPartCategory
                filteredCategory = filteredCategory.filterClone(partConstraintReq);
                String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
                        filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
                        partConstraintReq.toShortString());
                log.info(msg);
                if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
                    return Result.noSolution(msg);
                }
                PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.toPartCategoryInput(
                        filteredCategory, partConstraintReq);
                partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
            }
            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(partCategoryInputs);

            SolverResult sr = null;
            // ТБђТЪЦТў»тљдТюЅС╝ўтЁѕу║ДУДётѕЎ№╝їтдѓТъюТюЅтѕЎСй┐ућетѕєу║ДТ▒ѓУДБ
            Module moduleClone = module.clone();

            if (filteredCategory.hasPriorityRule()) {
                PartCategory mergedFilteredCategory = buildMergedFilteredCategory(originalCategory,
                        partCategoryInputs);
                moduleClone.addPartCategory(mergedFilteredCategory);
                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(
                        moduleClone, moduleInput);
            } else {
                moduleClone.addPartCategory(filteredCategory);
                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(moduleClone, moduleInput);
            }
            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());

        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to process part category constraint", e);
            return Result.failed("Failed to process part category constraint: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * т░єжЃеС╗ХтѕЌУАеТи╗тіатѕ░тљѕт╣ХуџётјЪтГљжЃеС╗ХMapСИГ
     *
     * @param mergedAtomicParts тљѕт╣ХуџётјЪтГљжЃеС╗ХMap
     * @param parts             жЃеС╗ХтѕЌУАе
     */
    private void addPartsToMap(Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts, List<Part> parts) {
        for (Part part : parts) {
            mergedAtomicParts.put(part.getCode(), part);
        }
    }

    /**

     * @param partCategoryInputs жЃеС╗Ху║дТЮЪтѕЌУАе
     * @return тљѕт╣Хтљју

    private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
            InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax,
            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {

        RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
        CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
        if (isFailed(status)) {
            throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
        }
        List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
        return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);

    }

    /**
     * ТБђТЪЦТ▒ѓУДБтЎеуіХТђЂТў»тљдтц▒У┤Ц
     *
     * @param status Т▒ѓУДБтЎеуіХТђЂ
     * @return Тў»тљдтц▒У┤Ц
     */
    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
    }

    /**
     * ТЅДУАїу║дТЮЪТјеуљє

     * @param isAttachRelax   Тў»тљджЎётіаТЮЙт╝ЏтЈўжЄЈ
     * @param confictedRelaxs тє▓уфЂТЮЙт╝ЏтЈўжЄЈтѕЌУАе
     * @return тїЁтљФТ▒ѓУДБтЎеуіХТђЂтњїтЏъУ░Ѓт»╣У▒АуџёRunInferParasRsp
     * @throws AlgLoaderException   тйЊу«ЌТ│ЋтіаУййтЎеТюфТЅЙтѕ░ТЌХТіЏтЄ║
     * @throws AlgExecutorException тйЊтѕЏт╗║у«ЌТ│ЋТЅДУАїТЌХТіЏтЄ║
     */
    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
            InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax,
            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // тѕЮтДІтїќу║дТЮЪТеАтъІ
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initModuleCpModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();

        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
            // т░єmoduleуџёCpModelProtoС┐АТЂ»УЙЊтЄ║тѕ░ТќЄС╗Хconfig.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
        }
        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // тЇЋу║┐уеІТљюу┤б№╝їжў▓ТГбТюЅжЄЇтцЇУДБ
        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
        }
        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
        // тЈ»ТїЅжюђУ«Йуй«ТЏ┤тцџтЈѓТЋ░
        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
        log.info("solver  models:\n");
        model.printModelSummary();
        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
    }

/**
 * ТеАтЮЌтЪ║у▒╗
 * тїЁтљФPartтњїPartCategoryуЏИтЁ│уџётЁгтЁ▒тГЌТ«хтњїТќ╣Т│Ћ
 * PartCategoryтњїModuleуџётЁгтЁ▒тЪ║у▒╗
 * 
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@Slf4j
public class ModuleBase extends Onto {

    /**
     * тјЪтГљжЃеС╗ХтѕЌУАе
     */
    protected List<Part> atomicParts = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * жЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗тѕЌУАе
     */
    protected List<PartCategory> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * жЃеС╗ХТўат░ёУАе
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    protected Map<String, Part> atomicPartMap = new HashMap<>();

    /**
     * тѕЮтДІтїќуЪГС╗БуаЂ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public void initShortCode() {
        initShortCode(1);
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    public int initShortCode(int startIndex) {
        int index = super.initShortCode(startIndex);
        for (Part part : atomicParts) {
            if (part.getCode().length() <= 4) { // тдѓТъюу╝ќуаЂжЋ┐т║дт░ЈС║јуГЅС║ј3№╝їтѕЎуЏ┤ТјЦСй┐ућеу╝ќуаЂ
                part.setShortCode(part.getCode());
            } else {
                part.setShortCode(Part.SHORT_CODE_PREFIX + index);
                index++;
            }
        }
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            index = partCategory.initShortCode(index);
        }
        return index;
    }

    /**
     * С╗јТеАтЮЌСИГТЪЦТЅЙжЃеС╗Хтѕєу▒╗

    @JsonIgnore
    public PartCategory getPartCategory(String categoryCode) {
        PartCategory result = null;
        // Та╣ТЇ«partCategorysтѕЮтДІтїќpartCategoryMap
        for (PartCategory pc : this.partCategorys) {
            result = getPartCategory(pc, categoryCode);
            if (null != result) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    private PartCategory getPartCategory(PartCategory category, String categoryCode) {
        if (category.getCode().equals(categoryCode)) {
            return category;
        }
        PartCategory result = null;
        // Та╣ТЇ«partCategorysтѕЮтДІтїќpartCategoryMap
        for (PartCategory pc : category.getPartCategorys()) {
            result = getPartCategory(pc, categoryCode);
            if (null != result) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * С╗јТеАтЮЌСИГТЪЦТЅЙжЃеС╗Х
     * 
     * @param partCode жЃеС╗ХС╗БуаЂ

     * @return
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Part getAtomicPart(String partCode) {
        if (atomicPartMap == null || atomicPartMap.isEmpty()) {
            // Та╣ТЇ«partsтѕЮтДІтїќpartMap
            for (Part part : atomicParts) {
                atomicPartMap.put(part.getCode(), part);
            }
        }
        return atomicPartMap.get(partCode);
    }

    /**

     *

    @JsonIgnore

        List<IPart> allParts = new ArrayList<>();

        }
        return allParts;
    }

    @JsonIgnore

package com.jmix.executor.impl;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.ModuleBase;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.AssignType;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleBaseInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ParaInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartCategoryInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.SolverResult;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleBaseAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.OtherVar;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ParaVarImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.PartAlgCPLinearExpr;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.PartCategoryAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.PartVarImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl;

import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolverSolutionCallback;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * ТеАтЮЌт«ъСЙІУДБтє│Тќ╣ТАѕтЏъУ░Ѓу▒╗
 * у╗ДТЅ┐CpSolverSolutionCallback№╝їућеС║јтцёуљєу║дТЮЪТ▒ѓУДБУ┐ЄуеІСИГуџёУДБтє│Тќ╣ТАѕтЏъУ░Ѓ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public class ModuleInstSolutionCallBack extends CpSolverSolutionCallback {

    private final Module module;

    // private final List<ModuleInst> allSolutions = new ArrayList<>();

    // уггтЄаСИфУДБ
    private int solutionIndex = 0;

    // тЁХС╗ќтЈўжЄЈТўат░ё
    private Map<String, OtherVar> otherVarMap;

    // у║дТЮЪу«ЌТ│Ћт«ъуј░№╝їућеС║јТЪЦУ»бС╝ўтЁѕу║Ду║дТЮЪ
    private ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg;

    // ТюђтцДУДБТЋ░жЄЈжЎљтѕХ№╝ї0УАеуц║ТЌажЎљтѕХ
    private int maxSolutionNum = 0;

    private PartAlgCPLinearExpr priorityExpr = null;

    private SolverResult solverResult = new SolverResult();

    /**
     * ТъёжђатЄйТЋ░
     * 
     * @param module      ТеАтЮЌт»╣У▒А
     * @param vars        тЈўжЄЈтѕЌУАе
     * @param otherVarMap тЁХС╗ќтЈўжЄЈТўат░ё
     * @param alg         у║дТЮЪу«ЌТ│Ћт«ъуј░
     */
    public ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(Module module,
            ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg) {
        this.module = module;
        this.moduleAlg = moduleAlg;
        this.priorityExpr = moduleAlg.queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr();
    }

    private ModuleInst buildModuleInst(ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg, int instanceId) {
        ModuleInst bInst = new ModuleInst();
        Module module = (Module) moduleAlg.getModule();
        bInst.setId(module.getId());
        buildModuleBaseInst(moduleAlg, instanceId, bInst);
        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlg : moduleAlg.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
            if (partCategoryAlg instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) {
                MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl multiInstPartCategoryAlg = (MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) partCategoryAlg;
                for (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl singleInstPartCategoryAlg : multiInstPartCategoryAlg
                        .getPartCategoryInsts()) {
                    PartCategoryInst pInst = buildPartCategoryInst(singleInstPartCategoryAlg,
                            singleInstPartCategoryAlg.getInstId());
                    bInst.addPartCategoryInst(pInst);
                }
            } else {
                SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl singleInstPartCategoryAlg = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) partCategoryAlg;
                PartCategoryInst pInst = buildPartCategoryInst(singleInstPartCategoryAlg,
                        singleInstPartCategoryAlg.getInstId());
                bInst.addPartCategoryInst(pInst);
            }
        }
        return bInst;
    }

    private PartCategoryInst buildPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryAlgImpl moduleAlg, int instanceId) {
        PartCategoryInst bInst = new PartCategoryInst();
        buildModuleBaseInst((ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlg, instanceId, bInst);
        return bInst;
    }

    private ModuleBaseInst buildModuleBaseInst(ModuleBaseAlgImpl moduleAlg, int instanceId, ModuleBaseInst bInst) {
        ModuleBase base = (ModuleBase) moduleAlg.getModule();
        bInst.setCode(base.getCode());
        bInst.setShortCode(base.getShortCode());
        bInst.setInstanceId(instanceId);
        for (ParaVarImpl pv : moduleAlg.getParaVars()) {
            ParaInst pi = toParaInst(pv);
            bInst.addParaInst(pi);
        }

        if (whereCondition != null && !whereCondition.isEmpty()) {

        Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*(==|!=|<=|>=|<|>)\\s*(\\d+)");

                req.setAttrCode(mergedParts[1]);

            req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());

    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {

     * @return ТјеУЇљуџёТеАтЮЌт«ъСЙІтѕЌУАе
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs) {
        List<PartConstraintReq> partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategoryCode, constraintReqs);

        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
        req.setPartCategoryCode(partCategoryCode);
        req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);

        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        long executionTime = endTime - startTime;
        log.info("Inference recommend execution time: {} ms", executionTime);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
        return getSolutions();
    }

    private void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect, boolean isSimple) {
        String msg = "Solution at index " + index + " should match expected string";
        assertTrue(solutions.size() >= index, msg);
        assertStringContains(solutions.get(index - 1).toShortString(isSimple),
                expect,
                msg);
    }

    private void assertStringContains(String real, String expect, String msg) {
        // boolean result = real.contains(expect);
        boolean result = contains(real, expect);
        if (!result) {
            assertEquals(expect, real, "contains is false," + msg);
        }
    }

package com.jmix.scenario.ruletest;

import com.jmix.executor.southinf.ModuleAlgBase;

@Slf4j
public class SearchStrategyTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    public SearchStrategyTest() {
        super(SearchConstraint.class);
    }

    /**
     * Constraint model for search strategy testing.
     * Single-instance CPU and Disk categories with price attributes.
     * Constraint: at most one part selected per category.
     */
    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
    public static class SearchConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {

        @PartAnno(code = "cpu")
        private PartCategoryVar cpu;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", price = 10)
        private PartVar cpu1Var;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", price = 5)
        private PartVar cpu2Var;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", price = 100)
        private PartVar cpu3Var;

        @PartAnno(code = "disk")
        private PartCategoryVar disk;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "disk", price = 50)
        private PartVar disk1Var;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "disk", price = 30)
        private PartVar disk2Var;

        @CodeRuleAnno()
        private void rule1() {
            model().addExactlyOne(new AlgCPLiteral[] { cpu1Var.selectedVar(), cpu2Var.selectedVar(), cpu3Var.selectedVar() });
            model().addExactlyOne(new AlgCPLiteral[] { disk1Var.selectedVar(), disk2Var.selectedVar() });
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
    }

    // ==================== SEARCH-001: Single category strategy ====================

    /**
     * SEARCH-001-1: CPU ASCENDING by price.
     * First solution should contain CPU2 (price=5, cheapest) selected with qty=1.
     */
    @Test
    public void testSearch001_AscendingPrice_Cpu() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: [strategy=ASCENDING:price]",
                "disk:");
        printSolutions();
        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu2(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
    }

    /**
     * SEARCH-001-2: CPU DESCENDING by price.
     * First solution should contain CPU3 (price=100, most expensive) selected with qty=1.
     */
    @Test
    public void testSearch001_DescendingPrice_Cpu() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: [strategy=DESCENDING:price]",
                "disk:");
        printSolutions();
        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu3(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
    }

    /**
     * SEARCH-001-3: No strategy (regression test).
     * Solutions should still be found without strategy.
     */
    @Test
    public void testSearch001_NoStrategy_Regression() {
        inferRecommendModule("cpu:", "disk:");
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
    }

        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu3(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
        assertSoluContain(1, "PT1(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
