## 5. У«ЙУ«АТќ╣ТАѕ

### 5.1 ТјеУЇљТќ╣ТАѕ№╝џУДётѕЎтѕєТхЂ + т╗ХУ┐ЪтЈўжЄЈтѕЏт╗║ + тЈ»жђЅС╗ХУБѓтЈўУАЦтЁе

ждќТюЪТјеУЇљТіітцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A уџё guard У»ГС╣ЅСИјтцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ B уџёУ»иТ▒ѓжЕ▒тіеУДётѕЎтіаУййУъЇтљѕУхиТЮЦ№╝їСйєТЅДУАїтйбТђЂСИЇТііТЅђТюЅтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЈљтЅЇТћЙУ┐ЏСИ╗ТеАтъІ№╝џ

1. У»иТ▒ѓтѕєТъљтЁѕтѕцТќГтЊфС║ЏтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗У┐ЏтЁЦтйЊтЅЇтѕєТћ»сђѓ
2. СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБтЈфтѕЏт╗║т┐ЁжђЅтѕєу▒╗тњїтйЊтЅЇтѕєТћ» present уџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈўжЄЈсђѓ
3. тљФ absent тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎСИЇУ┐ЏтЁЦСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБуАгу║дТЮЪсђѓ
4. т»╣жюђУдЂт▒Ћуц║ТѕќТјњт║ЈуџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝їтюеСИ╗УДБС╣ІтљјтѕЏт╗║ present тѕєТћ»т╣ХУ┐љУАїУй╗жЄЈУАЦтЁеТ▒ѓУДБсђѓ

У┐ЎтЦЌТќ╣ТАѕТЌбС┐ЮуЋЎС║є guard уџёСИђУЄ┤У»ГС╣Ѕ№╝їС╣ЪжЂ┐тЁЇТюфУдЂТ▒ѓуџётЈ»жђЅУЙЁТќЎТћЙтцДСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБуЕ║жЌ┤сђѓ

#### 5.1.1 жўХТ«хСИђ№╝џт┐ЁжђЅУ«ЙтцЄСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБ

СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБжўХТ«хтЈфтѕЏт╗║тЈўжЄЈт╣ХтіаУййУДётѕЎ№╝џ

- СИЇтљФтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗уџёУДётѕЎсђѓ
- ућеТѕиТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓУ┐ЏтЁЦ present тѕєТћ»уџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈітЁХуЏИтЁ│УДётѕЎсђѓ
- С╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦсђЂТјеУЇљуГќуЋЦТѕќ `REQUIRES` УДётѕЎТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓ present уџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈітЁХуЏИтЁ│УДётѕЎсђѓ

тдѓТъюућеТѕиТюфУдЂТ▒ѓ `mouse`№╝їСИћтйЊтЅЇтѕєТћ»С╣ЪСИЇТў» `presentMouse` тѕєТћ»№╝їтѕЎ `mouse` тѕєу▒╗СИІуџё `mouse1`сђЂ`mouse2` уГЅтГљжА╣СИЇтѕЏт╗║ `Select` / `Quantity` тЈўжЄЈ№╝ї`cpu_mouse_white` С╣ЪСИЇУ┐ЏтЁЦСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБуАгу║дТЮЪсђѓ

СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБУЙЊтЄ║тЪ║уАђУДБ№╝џ

```text
S1 = cpu1 + disk1
S2 = cpu2 + disk2
...
```

#### 5.1.2 жўХТ«хС║ї№╝џтЈ»жђЅС╗ХУБѓтЈў

т»╣Т»ЈСИфтЪ║уАђУДБ№╝їТїЅтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ућЪТѕљтѕєТћ»№╝џ

```text
S1.absentMouse  = cpu1 + disk1
S1.presentMouse = cpu1 + disk1 + mouseX
```

`presentMouse` тѕєТћ»СИЇТў»ТъџСИЙТЅђТюЅж╝аТаЄу╗ётљѕ№╝їУђїТў»У┐љУАїСИђСИфУй╗жЄЈУАЦтЁеТ▒ѓУДБ№╝џ

1. тЏ║т«џСИ╗УДБСИГуџёт┐ЁжђЅжЃеС╗ХжђЅТІЕтњїТЋ░жЄЈсђѓ
2. т░єтѕєТћ»СИіСИІТќЄТаЄУ«░СИ║ `mouse.present = true`сђѓ
3. СИ║ `mouse` тѕєу▒╗СИІжђџУ┐ЄУ»иТ▒ѓУ┐ЄТ╗цуџётђЎжђЅтГљжА╣тѕЏт╗║ `Select` / `Quantity` тЈўжЄЈсђѓ
4. тіаУйй `cpu_mouse_white` уГЅТХЅтЈі mouse уџёу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎсђѓ
5. тЈфТ▒ѓСИђСИфтЈ»УАїУАЦтЁе№╝їТѕќТїЅС╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦТ▒ѓСИђСИфТюђС╝ўУАЦтЁесђѓ

У┐ЎТаиСИ╗Т▒ѓУДБС╗ЇтЁ│Т│ежФўС╗итђ╝/т┐ЁжђЅУ«ЙтцЄ№╝їтЈ»жђЅС╗ХСйюСИ║СйјС╗итђ╝УЙЁТќЎтюетљјтцёуљєжўХТ«хУАЦтЁесђѓ

#### 5.1.3 у╗ЊТъюТјњт║Ј

у╗ЊТъюУ┐ћтЏъТЌХТїЅуГќуЋЦтљѕт╣ХТјњт║Ј№╝џ

| У»иТ▒ѓуГќуЋЦ | тЈ»жђЅС╗Хтцёуљє |
| --- | --- |
| С╗иТа╝Тюђт░Ј `MIN` | тдѓТъютЈ»жђЅС╗ХС╗иТа╝жЮъУ┤Ъ№╝їСИЇтљФтЈ»жђЅС╗ХуџёУДБТјњтюетЅЇжЮб№╝ЏС╗ЇтЈ»У┐ћтЏътИдтЈ»жђЅС╗ХтѕєТћ»СйєТјњтюетљјжЮб |
| С╗иТа╝ТюђтцД `MAX` | т╝║тѕХ present тѕєТћ»№╝ЏтдѓТъюУАЦтЁетц▒У┤ЦтѕЎУ»ЦСИ╗УДБСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ |
| ТЌаС╗иТа╝уГќуЋЦ | У┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тѕєТћ»№╝їС║цу╗ЎућеТѕитѕцТќГ |
| ТїЄт«џ `mouse` т┐ЁжА╗жЁЇуй« | СИ╗Т▒ѓУДБТѕќУАЦтЁежўХТ«хт┐ЁжА╗ present№╝їСИЇУ┐ћтЏъ absent тѕєТћ» |
| С╗ЁТюЅ `mouse` У┐ЄТ╗цТѕќТјњт║ЈуГќуЋЦ | У┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тѕєТћ»№╝Џpresent тѕєТћ»т┐ЁжА╗Т╗АУХ│У┐ЄТ╗цТѕќТјњт║ЈуГќуЋЦ |

Т│еТёЈ№╝џтдѓТъютљју╗ГТћ»ТїЂУ┤ЪС╗иТа╝сђЂТіўТЅБсђЂУхатЊЂТѕќтЦЌжцљУ┐ћуѓ╣№╝ї`MIN` СИЇт║ћу«ђтЇЋУи│У┐ЄтЈ»жђЅС╗Х№╝їУђїУдЂућ▒С╗иТа╝уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░тѕцТќГсђѓ

### 5.2 тцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A№╝џТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guard

т░єтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╣Ъу║│тЁЦтљїСИђСИф CP-SAT ТеАтъІ№╝їСИ║Т»ЈСИфтѕєу▒╗тѕЏт╗║ `present` тИЃт░ћтЈўжЄЈ№╝їт╣ХСй┐уће `OnlyEnforceIf` ТјДтѕХу╗ётљѕУДётѕЎсђѓ

ТюгТќ╣ТАѕТў»У»ГС╣ЅТюђт«їТЋ┤уџёжЋ┐ТюЪтйбТђЂ№╝їСйєСИЇСйюСИ║ P0 ж╗ўУ«цТЅДУАїтйбТђЂсђѓтјЪтЏаТў»тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЋ░жЄЈУЙЃтцџТЌХ№╝їСИ╗ТеАтъІС╝џтљїТЌХт╝ЋтЁЦтцДжЄЈ `present` тЈўжЄЈсђЂтГљжА╣жђЅТІЕтЈўжЄЈсђЂТЋ░жЄЈтЈўжЄЈтњї tuple у║дТЮЪ№╝ЏтдѓТъют«бТѕиТ▓АТюЅТўјуА«УдЂТ▒ѓУ┐ЎС║ЏтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗№╝їУ┐ЄТЌЕТћЙтЁЦСИ╗ТеАтъІтЈ»УЃйт╣▓ТЅ░тЁ│жћ«уЅЕТќЎуџётцџУДБжђЅТІЕ№╝їт╣ХтбътіаТ▒ѓУДБТѕљТюгсђѓ

тєЁжЃет«ъуј░С╝фС╗БуаЂ№╝џ

```java
BoolVar mousePresent = model.newBoolVar("mouse_present");
LinearExpr mouseSelected = sumSelected("mouse");

model.addGreaterOrEqual(mouseSelected, 1).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
model.addEquality(mouseSelected, 0).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent.not());

Constraint white = model.addAllowedAssignments(
        new LinearArgument[] { cpuChoice, mouseChoice });
white.addTuple(cpu1Id, mouse1Id);
white.addTuple(cpu2Id, mouse2Id);
white.onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
```

УІЦУ┐Ўу▒╗УЃйтіЏжюђУдЂУ┐ЏтЁЦС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋТѕќућЪТѕљт╝ЈтЇЌтљЉу«ЌТ│Ћ№╝їт║ћТћ╣тєЎСИ║ facade тЈБтЙё№╝їСЙІтдѓ№╝џ

```java
AlgCPBoolVar mousePresent = model().newBoolVar("mouse_present");
PartAlgCPLinearExpr mouseSelected = model().sum4Selected("mouse", "Quantity", "");

model().addGreaterOrEqual(mouseSelected, 1).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent);
model().addEquality(mouseSelected, 0).onlyEnforceIf(mousePresent.not());
```

тйЊтЅЇ `ModuleCPModel` ти▓Тћ»ТїЂ `newBoolVar`сђЂу║┐ТђДУАеУЙЙсђЂ`onlyEnforceIf` уГЅтЪ║уАђУЃйтіЏ№╝їСйєт░џТюфТџ┤жю▓ `addAllowedAssignments` / `addForbiddenAssignments`сђѓтЏаТГц table constraint уЅѕТюгтЈфУЃйСйюСИ║тєЁжЃет«ъуј░уаћуЕХТѕќтљју╗Г facade ТЅЕт▒Ћ№╝їСИЇУЃйтєЎУ┐ЏтйЊтЅЇС║ДтЊЂу«ЌТ│ЋжфїТћХС╗БуаЂсђѓ

С╝ўуѓ╣№╝џ

жбёТюЪ№╝џ

- уј░ТюЅ `CompatibleRuleIncompatibleTest`сђЂ`CompatibleRuleRequireTest`сђЂ`CompatibleRuleCodependentTest` тЏътйњжђџУ┐Єсђѓ

### AC-009: validate жЂхтЙфуЏИтљї guard У»ГС╣Ѕ

У»┤Тўј№╝џ`validate(ModuleValidateReq)` Тў»уЏ«ТаЄТјЦтЈБсђѓтйЊтЅЇ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` С╗ЁТЈљСЙЏ `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/postCalculate`№╝їтЏаТГцТюгућеСЙІућеС║ју║дТЮЪтљју╗ГТјЦтЈБУ«ЙУ«А№╝їСИЇТў»тйЊтЅЇтЈ»ТЅДУАїтЏътйњсђѓ

у╗Ўт«џжЁЇуй«№╝џ

```text
cpu4 + disk1
```

жбёТюЪ№╝џ

- `validate` жђџУ┐Є№╝їтЏаСИ║ mouse absentсђѓ

у╗Ўт«џжЁЇуй«№╝џ

```text
cpu4 + disk1 + mouse2
```

жбёТюЪ№╝џ

- `validate` тц▒У┤Ц№╝їтЏаСИ║ mouse present СИћТюфтЉйСИГуЎйтљЇтЇЋсђѓ

### 7.2 УЙ╣уЋїТЮАС╗Х

| ТЮАС╗Х | УЙЊтЁЦ | жбёТюЪУАїСИ║ |
| --- | --- | --- |
| тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌатЈ»УАїУАЦтЁе | СИ╗УДБтГўтюе№╝їСйє optional present тѕєТћ»ТЌаУДБ | С┐ЮуЋЎ absent тѕєТћ»№╝Џpresent тѕєТћ»СИбт╝Ѓт╣ХУ«░тйЋтјЪтЏа |
| тцџСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ | mouseсђЂkeyboard жЃйТюфУдЂТ▒ѓ | ТїЅУБѓтЈўСИіжЎљућЪТѕљтѕєТћ»№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇТїЄТЋ░УєеУЃђ |
| тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗УбФтЁХС╗ќУДётѕЎУдЂТ▒ѓ | `cpu8 REQUIRES mouse` | mouse тЈўСИ║ present№╝їуЏИтЁ│уЎйтљЇтЇЋућЪТЋѕ |
| тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╗иТа╝СИ║У┤Ъ | `priceStrategy=MIN` | СИЇтЙЌу«ђтЇЋУи│У┐Є present тѕєТћ»№╝їжюђућ▒уЏ«ТаЄтЄйТЋ░тѕцТќГ |
| У»иТ▒ѓтЈфТюЅ `where` У┐ЄТ╗ц | `mouse: where Level=2` | СИЇт╝║тѕХ mouse present№╝ЏУ┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тђЎжђЅ№╝їpresent тѕєТћ»т┐ЁжА╗Т╗АУХ│ `Level=2` |
| У»иТ▒ѓтЈфТюЅ strategy | `mouse: [strategy=ASCENDING:price]` | СИЇт╝║тѕХ mouse present№╝ЏУ┐ћтЏъ absent СИј present СИцу▒╗тђЎжђЅ№╝їpresent тѕєТћ»ТїЅуГќуЋЦТјњт║Ј |

## 9. жБјжЎЕСИјтЁ╝т«╣уГќуЋЦ

### 9.1 у╗ЊТъюТЋ░жЄЈУєеУЃђ

тцџСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗С╝џС║ДућЪу╗ётљѕУБѓтЈўсђѓу╝ЊУДБуГќуЋЦ№╝џ

- P0 тЈфт»╣ТўјуА«жЁЇуй«СИ║тЈ»ТјеУЇљуџётЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЂџУБѓтЈўсђѓ
- тбътіаТюђтцДУБѓтЈўТЋ░жЄЈжЁЇуй«сђѓ
- Т»ЈСИфСИ╗УДБТ»ЈСИфтЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗тЈфТ▒ѓСИђСИфтЈ»УАїУАЦтЁесђѓ
- тљју╗ГТћ»ТїЂТїЅС╗итђ╝/С╗иТа╝Тјњт║ЈТѕфТќГсђѓ

### 9.2 СИ╗УДБСИјтЈ»жђЅУАЦтЁеСИЇТў»тЁет▒ђТюђС╝ў

СИцжўХТ«хТ▒ѓУДБтЈ»УЃйТЌаТ│ЋС┐ЮУ»ЂРђют┐ЁжђЅ + тЈ»жђЅРђЮТЋ┤СйЊтЁет▒ђТюђС╝ўсђѓждќТюЪТјЦтЈЌУ»ЦжЎљтѕХ№╝їтЏаСИ║СИџтіАуЏ«ТаЄТў»жЂ┐тЁЇтЈ»жђЅС╗Хтй▒тЊЇСИ╗У«ЙтцЄТ▒ѓУДБ№╝їт╣ХСИћУЙЁТќЎжђџтИИСйјС╗итђ╝сђѓ

тдѓТъютљју╗ГжюђУдЂСИЦТа╝тЁет▒ђТюђС╝ў№╝їт║ћУйгтљЉРђютцЄжђЅТќ╣ТАѕ A№╝џТ▒ѓУДБтЎетєЁ presence guardРђЮсђѓ

### 9.3 УДётѕЎСЙЮУхќУ»єтѕФСИЇт«їТЋ┤

тдѓТъюУДётѕЎт╝ЋућетЁ│у│╗СИЇтЄєуА«№╝їтЈ»УЃйТ╝ЈтіаУййтЈ»жђЅУДётѕЎсђѓP0 тюеТхІУ»ЋТЋ░ТЇ«тњї `CombinationStructRuleSchema.dimensionCategoryCodes` СИГТўјуА«тєЎТГ╗у╗┤т║д№╝їС╣ЪтЈ»С╗ЦтцЇућетйЊтЅЇ `RefProgObjSchema` т╝ЋућетѕЌУАе№╝Џтљју╗ГСй┐уће `RFC-0008` уџё `RuleReferenceSet` у╗ЪСИђСЙЮУхќсђѓ

### 9.4 ТЌДУДётѕЎтЁ╝т«╣

тйЊтЅЇТЅђТюЅтѕєу▒╗жЃйТ▓АТюЅ `required=false` тЁЦтЈБ№╝їУ┐ЂуД╗тљјС╣Ът┐ЁжА╗ж╗ўУ«цУДєСИ║т┐ЁжђЅ№╝їуА«С┐Юти▓ТюЅућеСЙІУАїСИ║СИЇтЈўсђѓ

### 9.5 тЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎУЂїУ┤БУЙ╣уЋїтЈўтїќ

уД╗жЎцтЁ╝т«╣УДётѕЎСИГуџёжџљт╝Ј `ExactlyOne` тљј№╝їтјЪТЮЦСЙЮУхќУ»ЦтЅ»СйюућеуџёТхІУ»ЋтЈ»УЃйжюђУдЂУАЦтЁЁТўЙт╝ЈжђЅТІЕУДётѕЎсђѓУ┐ЂуД╗уГќуЋЦ№╝џ

package com.jmix.executor.model;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrParaType;

import java.util.List;

import lombok.Data;

/**
 * жќ«сёцТгбу╗Й№ИйТйФуњЄжћІую░
 * жљбсёцу░гуђ╣Т░Фу«Ъжќ«сёцТгбжЈїсЃеЬЄЌжљетІГт«│жЈЅуєИТй»Тха?
 *
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
@Data
public class PartConstraintReq {
    /**
     * уЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛЁУбФжЇе?
     */
    private AttrParaType attrType = AttrParaType.Sum;

    /**
     * уЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛѓтћгжљ«?
     */
    private String attrCode;

    /**
     * уЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛёуў«ТЮѕтєфЬЃЂ
     */
    private String attrComparator;

    /**
     * уЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛЃРѓг?
     */
    private String attrValue;

    /**
     * уЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛєу╣ЃтЕісѓєТй»Тха?
     */
    private String attrWhereCondition;

    /**
     * жќ«сёцТгбжЇњтЌЎУбФТха№йЄуѕюжћЏтабТЋцТхют║буЁАуњЄсѕАТцѓжјИтЏДуЋЙжЇЈУюѓуХІжљетЄ▒artCategoryжћЏ?
     */
    private String partCategoryCode;

    /**
     * жЇљт┤ЄуЊЦу╗ЏТаФТџљжЇњТЦёсђЃ
     * жљбсёцу░гжјИтЏДуЋЙуњЄсЃЕтё┤ТхаУи║тъју╗ФУЇцТ«ЉжЇЎТЕђтЎ║жЇњтЌўТЋ«ТццтЊёу░Г
     */
    private List<StrategyConfig> decisionStrategies;

    /**
     * жљбуєИтъџжљГЬЁъуЊДу╗Ќ№И┐УдєуљЏсёДсЂџ
     * жЈЇуЁју┤АжћЏТГ▒artCategoryCode:attrCode attrComparator attrValue where
     * attrWhereCondition
     * у╗ђУй░уиЦжћЏ?drive:Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed like %5400%"
     * 
     * @return жљГЬЁъуЊДу╗Ќ№И┐УдєуљЏсёДсЂџ
     */
    public String toShortString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();

        // теБУ»▓тДъжќ«сёцТгбжЇњтЌЎУбФТха№йЄуѕю
        if (partCategoryCode != null && !partCategoryCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(partCategoryCode).append(":");
        }

        // теБУ»▓тДъуЂъуѓ┤РѓгЛѓтћгжљ«СйхРѓгСй╣уў«ТЮѕтєфЬЃЂжЇют▒йРѓг?
        if (attrCode != null && !attrCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(attrCode);
            if (attrComparator != null && !attrComparator.isEmpty() && attrValue != null && !attrValue.isEmpty()) {
                sb.append(" ").append(attrComparator);
                // тДБТЌЄуиЮу╗Ќ№╣ђТІ░жЇіжЌ┤у«БжЌѓу┐аугЅжЇћуіхРћќжЈЇуАиу┤ЮТИџтгфЬЏД ">=5" жЉ░т▒╝угЅжЈё?">= 5"
                sb.append(attrValue);
            }
        }

        // теБУ»▓тДъ where жЈЅРђ▓Тгб
        if (attrWhereCondition != null && !attrWhereCondition.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(" where ").append(attrWhereCondition);
        }

        return sb.toString();
    }
}

    @Override

    private void applyStrategies(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, List<StrategyConfig> strategies) {
        for (StrategyConfig config : strategies) {
            if (config.getStrategyType() == null || config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.UNSPECIFIED) {
                continue;
            }
            if (config.getSortAttributeCode() == null || config.getSortAttributeCode().isEmpty()) {
                log.warn("Strategy has no sortAttributeCode, skipping");
                continue;
            }
            applySingleStrategy(pcAlg, config);
        }
    }

    private void applySingleStrategy(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, StrategyConfig config) {
        List<PartVarImpl> partVars = pcAlg.getAllPartVars("");
        if (partVars.isEmpty()) {
            log.warn("No part vars found for category {}, skipping strategy", pcAlg.getCategoryCode());
            return;
        }

        String sortAttr = config.getSortAttributeCode();
        boolean ascending = config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.ASCENDING;

        // Sort part vars by the sort attribute
        partVars.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(pv -> getSortValue(pv, sortAttr)));

        // Reverse for descending
        if (!ascending) {
            java.util.Collections.reverse(partVars);
        }

        // Get isSelected BoolVars (which are IntVars) in sorted order
        IntVar[] vars = partVars.stream()
                .map(PartVarImpl::getIsSelected)
                .toArray(IntVar[]::new);

        // SELECT_MAX_VALUE: try selecting parts first, which means preferred parts
        // (sorted first) get selected in early solutions
        model.addDecisionStrategy(vars,
                DecisionStrategyProto.VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST,
                DecisionStrategyProto.DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE);

        log.info("Applied decision strategy: {} on {} vars for category {}, sortAttr={}",
                config.getStrategyType(), vars.length, pcAlg.getCategoryCode(), sortAttr);
    }

    /**
     * Get the integer sort value for a part variable by attribute code.
     * Supports basic attributes like "price" and dynamic attributes.
     */
    private int getSortValue(PartVarImpl partVar, String attrCode) {
        if ("price".equals(attrCode) && partVar.getBase() instanceof Part) {
            Long price = ((Part) partVar.getBase()).getPrice();
            return price != null ? price.intValue() : 0;
        }
        return partVar.getAttr4Int(attrCode);
    }
}
```

    /**
     * Apply decision strategies to part category variables.
     * Called after all variables are created and before rule initialization.
     */
    private void applyDecisionStrategies() {
        ModuleInput mi = getModuleInput();
        if (mi == null || mi.getPartCategoryInputs() == null) {
            return;
        }
        for (PartCategoryInputBase input : mi.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
            PartConstraintReq orgReq = input.getOrgReq();
            if (orgReq == null) {
                continue;
            }
            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = orgReq.getDecisionStrategies();
            if (strategies == null || strategies.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }

            String partCategoryCode = input.getPartCategoryCode();

            if (input instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
                MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) input;
                for (PartCategoryInput pcInput : multiInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
                    PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(pcInput.getPartCategoryCode());
                    if (pcAlg != null) {
                        applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
                    }
                }
            } else {
                PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
                if (pcAlg != null) {
                    applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private void applyStrategies(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, List<StrategyConfig> strategies) {
        for (StrategyConfig config : strategies) {
            if (config.getStrategyType() == null || config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.UNSPECIFIED) {
                continue;
            }
            if (config.getSortAttributeCode() == null || config.getSortAttributeCode().isEmpty()) {
                log.warn("Strategy has no sortAttributeCode, skipping");
                continue;
            }
            applySingleStrategy(pcAlg, config);
        }
    }

+            List<PartCategoryInputBase> selectedOptionalInputs, SolverResult merged, int remainingBranchCount) {
+        if (remainingBranchCount <= 0 || filterResult.optionalPartCategoryInputs().isEmpty()) {
+            return remainingBranchCount;

+            remainingBranchCount--;
+            if (remainingBranchCount <= 0) {

+                    selectedOptionalInputs, merged, remainingBranchCount);
+            selectedOptionalInputs.remove(selectedOptionalInputs.size() - 1);
+            if (remainingBranchCount <= 0) {

+        return remainingBranchCount;

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

/**
 * тДБТЌЄуиЮжј┐тХёуХћу╗Ќ№ИйуЂЄТХЊ?
 * уђ╣Т░Фу«Ъу╗Й№ИйТйФТХЊЬЁЪТЋ«жјИСй║Т«ЉтДБТЌЄуиЮжј┐тХёуХћ
 *
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
public enum ComparisonOperator {
    EQUAL("==") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addEquality(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " == " + value;
        }
    },
    NOT_EQUAL("!=") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addDifferent(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " != " + value;
        }
    },
    LESS_THAN("<") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addLessThan(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " < " + value;
        }
    },
    LESS_OR_EQUAL("<=") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addLessOrEqual(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " <= " + value;
        }
    },
    GREATER_THAN(">") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addGreaterThan(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " > " + value;
        }
    },
    GREATER_OR_EQUAL(">=") {
        @Override
        public void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value) {
            cpModel.addGreaterOrEqual(expr, value);
        }

        @Override
        public String getFormulaString(String expr, int value) {
            return expr + " >= " + value;
        }
    };

    private final String symbol;

    ComparisonOperator(String symbol) {
        this.symbol = symbol;
    }

    /**
     * жЉЙт│░тйЄжј┐тХёуХћу╗Ќ№ИЙЬЃЂжЇЎ?
     *
     * @return жј┐тХёуХћу╗Ќ№╣ђуЊДу╗Ќ№И┐Удє
     */
    public String getSymbol() {
        return symbol;
    }

    /**
     * Тљ┤ТЌѓТЋцу╗Й№ИйТйФжЇњуЎѕPтд»Рђ│уђи
     *
     * @param cpModel CPтд»Рђ│уђи
     * @param expr    у╗ЙТїјРѓгЛєсђЃТЮѕТЃДу┤А
     * @param value   тДБТЌЄуиЮжЇі?
     */
    public abstract void applyConstraint(AlgCPModel cpModel, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr, int value);

    /**
     * жЉЙт│░тйЄжЇЈЬёђу┤АуђЏТЦЃЬЃЂТХЊУїХсђЃу╗ђ?
     *
     * @param expr  уљЏсёеТЈфт»«т┐ЊуЊДу╗Ќ№И┐Удє
     * @param value тДБТЌЄуиЮжЇі?
     * @return уђ╣т▒ЙТџБжљетІФтЈЋт»«т┐ЊуЊДу╗Ќ№И┐Удє
     */
    public abstract String getFormulaString(String expr, int value);

    /**
     * жЈЇУДётхЂу╗Ќ№╣ђтй┐жЉЙт│░тйЄуђхуЉ░у░▓жљетІгуЂЄТХЊТЃДРѓг?
     *
     * @param symbol жј┐тХёуХћу╗Ќ№ИЙЬЃЂжЇЎ?
     * @return уђхуЉ░у░▓жљетІгуЂЄТХЊТЃДРѓг?
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException Уц░ТњХЬЃЂжЇЎУюѓугЅжЈђЬѕЏт»ћжЈЃУѕхтДЈжЇЉ?
     */
    public static ComparisonOperator fromSymbol(String symbol) {
        for (ComparisonOperator op : values()) {
            if (op.symbol.equals(symbol)) {
                return op;
            }
        }
        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported comparison operator: " + symbol);
    }
}

-СИЇУ┐Є№╝ї`CompatibleConstraintAlg.addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible` Тў»ти▓ТюЅС╗БуаЂУи»тЙё№╝їуј░ТюЅ `CompatibleRuleIncompatibleTest`сђЂ`CompatibleRuleRequireTest`сђЂ`CompatibleRuleCodependentTest` уГЅућеСЙІтЈ»УЃйСЙЮУхќт«Ѓуџёжџљт╝Ј exactly-one УАїСИ║сђѓСИ║жЂ┐тЁЇ RFC-0009 уџёУљйтю░ТЅЕтцДТћ╣тіежЮб№╝їP0 СИЇУдЂТ▒ѓуФІтЇ│С┐«Тћ╣У»ЦТќ╣Т│Ћ№╝ЏТюг RFC С╝ўтЁѕУдЂТ▒ѓ `RFC-0007` уџё `CodependantRuleSchema` / `CodependantConstraintExecutor` тюежЮбт»╣тЈ»жђЅтѕєу▒╗ТЌХжЂхт«ѕ guard СИјт╗ХУ┐ЪтЈўжЄЈтѕЏт╗║У»ГС╣Ѕсђѓ

package com.jmix.scenario.ruletest;

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse;
import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;

import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;

import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * RFC-0009 optional PartCategory guard tests.
 */
public class OptionalPartCategoryWhitelistGuardTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    public OptionalPartCategoryWhitelistGuardTest() {
        super(OptionalMouseConstraint.class);
    }

    @ModuleAnno(id = 9009L)
    public static class OptionalMouseConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {

        @PartAnno(code = "cpu")
        @DAttrAnno1(code = "CoreNum", dynAttrType = DynamicAttributeType.E_STRING,
                options = {"Core_4:4", "Core_8:8"})
        private PartCategoryVar cpu;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"4"}, price = 100)
        private PartVar cpu4;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"8"}, price = 200)
        private PartVar cpu8;

        @PartAnno(code = "disk")
        private PartCategoryVar disk;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "disk", price = 50)
        private PartVar disk1;

        @PartAnno(code = "mouse", required = false)
        @DAttrAnno1(code = "Level", dynAttrType = DynamicAttributeType.E_STRING,
                options = {"Low:1", "High:2"})
        private PartCategoryVar mouse;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "mouse", attrs = {"1"}, price = 10)
        private PartVar mouse1;

        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "mouse", attrs = {"2"}, price = 30)
        private PartVar mouse2;

        @CodeRuleAnno()
        private void requiredSelection() {
            model().addExactlyOne(cpu.parts().stream()
                    .map(PartVar::selectedVar)
                    .toArray(AlgCPLiteral[]::new));
            model().addExactlyOne(disk.parts().stream()
                    .map(PartVar::selectedVar)
                    .toArray(AlgCPLiteral[]::new));
        }

        @CodeRuleAnno(leftProObjsStr = "cpu:Select", rightProObjsStr = "mouse:Select")
        private void cpuMouseWhitelist() {
            inCompatible("rule_cpu4_not_mouse2", "cpu:CoreNum=4", "mouse:Level=2");
            inCompatible("rule_cpu8_not_mouse1", "cpu:CoreNum=8", "mouse:Level=1");
        }
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
    }

    @Test
    public void testOptionalMouseAbsentDoesNotBlockMainSolve() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
                "disk:");

        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
        assertTrue(hasSolutionWithSelectedParts("cpu4", "disk1"));
    }

    @Test
    public void testOptionalMouseMentionReturnsAbsentAndPresentBranches() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
                "disk:",
                "mouse: where Level=1");

        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
        assertTrue(hasSolutionWithoutPartCategory("mouse"));
        assertTrue(hasSolutionWithSelectedParts("cpu4", "mouse1"));
        assertFalse(hasSolutionWithSelectedParts("cpu4", "mouse2"));
    }

    @Test
    public void testOptionalMousePresentWhitelistMustApply() {
        inferRecommendModule(
                "cpu: where CoreNum=4",
                "disk:",
                "mouse:Sum_Quantity ==1 where Level=2");

        resultAssert().assertNoSolution();
    }

    private boolean hasSolutionWithSelectedParts(String... partCodes) {
        if (getSolutions() == null) {
            return false;
        }
        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
            boolean matched = true;
            for (String partCode : partCodes) {
                if (!hasSelectedPart(solution, partCode)) {
                    matched = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (matched) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
